dialogue:
this is so messy. Sorry I love spaghetti. 
Anyway quickenter/escape > moving to new x/y position > default position > animation+bounce > plain spawning. quickenter/escape will skip animation but apply endresult. Keep track of those somehow. 
bbcode works now but i dont think ill use it except for yurina/ami
Ok yay thx future me byeeeeeee

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I forgot about the math homework due today...

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I wonder if Koharu will let me copy hers?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: …Actually, screw that. I'll just do it right now!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: It was like, Hospital's rule or something? Can't be that hard.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Oh oh oh! That musician is back!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: (I saw a bit of their performance the other day, but I only arrived in the middle of their last song.)

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yay~★ I hope they play some more this time.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Ooooh, the band on that billboard, I think I've seen them before…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Leo/need… Leo/need… Um…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Oh yeah! Hiroshi and I saw them at Jamfest last year. The one with the really cool frontman!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Not as cool as DIOS though.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh, Nightcord tweeted something!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Looks like they're celebrating their anniversary soon.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (They've been on hiatus for a while. It makes sense, though. I think most of them are in uni now...)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Still, I'm glad they remembered their fans.)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Maybe I should rearrange one of their songs as a tribute.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Too many people…)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (I just wanted to pick up age of audio's new single, but apparently, this is rush hour for all the most annoying, inconvinent people in the city.)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (—Ugh! The light is green! You can walk and take pictures at the same time!)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Move!!!)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: There's still a tag on this hat…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Mayuko gave me this weird looking shark hat completely out of the blue…)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (I mean. she means well, but I don't think I'm ever going to wear this. Like, ever.)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …*sigh*

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Nevermind. I'll find something to do with it.)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: This is bullshit. I'm basically an adult. Who cares how I wear the uniform?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: They should have a day where everyone can wear what they want. Make it a spirit day, or something.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Actually, with the type of people here, that might get chaotic...

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (Ohhhhhhh no.)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (I reached out to that guy for a gig last month, and I totally forgot to follow up with him on it.)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (I don't think he noticed me yet. Maybe I can just…)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Excuse me, sorry, just need to get past you...

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You'd think Miku would spend some time cleaning this place…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (I borrowed one of her headphones, but the supply closet's such a mess. I don't even know where this is supposed to go.)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …Blah, I give up. She can deal with it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (That billboard...)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (age of audio just released a single, so obviously, they're going to market it.)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (I wonder if the others got a copy…)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (…No, I can't think about that. I have my own responsibilities to handle.)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Oh, these shirts are cute. Especially the one with the floral accents. Should I get it..?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I don't know when I'd get a chance to wear them though. Most of the time I'm working in the dark.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hmm…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Maybe I'll save it for a slow day.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Jesus Christ above— are we a bunch of animals?!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Who leaves their headphones on the ground for anyone to trip over??

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (Usually, I'd blame Yurina, but apparently Miku's just as bad...)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Fine then. If she won't clean this place up, then I guess I will.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I shouldn't have offered to take that shift... I completely forgot about the math homework.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Maybe Mayuko will let me copy hers..?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: ...No, nevermind. I can't have her thinking I don't take my studies seriously.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I'll just finish it now and hope she goes easy on me...

speaker: 5k
dialogue: First I overslept. Then I forgot to pack my math textbook this morning.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Then I had to borrow from Chiyomi, because I forgot to bring money for lunch…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: And now I'm going to be late to my shift!!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Seriously, what the hell! Who did I piss off? What did I do in a past life to deserve all this?!

speaker: An Ominous Visage from the Heavens
dialogue: *somehow i play danganronpa music here*

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Miku?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (Hmm, I can't find her outside…)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (Does that mean she's in the academy? She always says that she's skipping class when she's out here, but…)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (I mean, no way she actually has classes to attend! What would she even be learning? Who would be teaching?)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (…But if she is, that means it must be important. I shouldn't take her away from her education.)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Nevermind, I'll just find her later.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Support classes are over…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: (I'm supposed to go right back to homeroom, but no one's caught me coming out here yet…)

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …Just until my headache goes away.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ...The courtyard's really nice without all the noise…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh, the line for the pop-up cafe is really long…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: (I wish school didn't go on for so long… I could've lined up earlier.)

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ...*Sigh* The pain of having your niche series blow up, I guess.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I hope there's still merch left…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't have a reason to be here.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I should just go home. I should at least try the assignment. I should at least turn in something…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Forget it…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: (I shouldn't have signed up for this...)

speaker: 7s
dialogue: (I only joined the disciplinary committee to get out of class easier, but actually marking people up is a pain.)

speaker: 7s
dialogue: (Why can't everyone just do what they're told?)

speaker: 7s
dialogue: ...! Hey, that's not the uniform!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Wha— Come back!!!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yuuka and Akari are with their friends, so I have some time to kill.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Mmm, I kinda don't want to do homework though… It's such a nice day outside!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I'd go for a proper run, but I can't leave the girls out of my sight. I'll just do laps around the playground.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Council meeting is over…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh no, that went on for way too long! I'm going to be late to pick up the girls.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Maybe I should ask Toshiki to…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: —No, I can make it! I'll just have to run!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Honestly, I didn't even have to come back to class. There's only half an hour before school lets out.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: ...But there's a meeting today, and Sanae's coming all the way from Kamiyama. I can't be skipping just for the hell of it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Besides, what would they do without me? My glorious, guiding presence? I'm practically the heart of the club!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: (I survived today's session…)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: (…Ha, I can perform just fine, but when it comes to anything outside of that…)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: (How long until everyone realizes…)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: (…Get a grip, Kaori. Take ten, then go home.)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I don't think they'll find me out here.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: (Miku and the others are nice and all, but sometimes, I don't want to entertain them.)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: (And when I *do* talk to Miku, she acts so strange. I don't know what she expects from me.)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Alright, I'll take five and head back out.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I wish the music room wasn't so busy during lunch. I'd like to get some practice in before the period ends.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Usually, there's people in the classrooms, so I can't go there. And I already practice outside, so the rooftop isn't ideal either.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (Actually, Sanae might get on my case about not eating lunch again...)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Nevermind. I'll just wait until afterschool to practice.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I got chased out...

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I didn't need a permit to perform here before... When did they implement that?)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (...Why does this keep happening? Everything, always changing. Is nothing sacred anymore..?)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ...It can't be helped. I'll head to the park and practice there.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (That was passable.)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (Usually, my wrist and shoulder would be hurting at this point. I suppose Rion had a point about my posture...)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Alright. Once more.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: (Usually, the hall monitors get on my case about following the dress code...

speaker: 10a
dialogue: ...But ever since the blonde one saw me with Toshiki, she's been looking the other way.)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: KYAHAHA! The power of connections!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I dunno what Toshiki did, but I should thank him~

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Oh. My. God.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: This chew toy is SO CUTE!!! What a cute little face!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I know these are for dogs to, like, chew on… but maybe Bonbon would want it?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Eek, nevermind. Totally forgot about my spending plan.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Bonbon's not a hunter anyway. The worst he'd do is, like, throw it around when he's mad.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Wait, that would be totally cute too… Hmm...

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Hmph, the cool store clerk isn't here today…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I wasn't really planning on buying anything today, TBH. I only came here to tell her about the band.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Maybe I should, like, actually get her LINE…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …WAHHhh, too scary! Forget it, I'll just windowshop and go home.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: For some reason, the others never hang out in the music room during lunch.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean, there's a lot of friendly people here! And the atmosphere's really nice!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Though, it's kinda a free-for-all in here. Maybe they don't like the chaos.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: ...Alright! Next time, I'll invite Toshiki and the others to have lunch here! We'll totally fit in.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I haven't been to that instrument shop in a while...

speaker: 11k
dialogue: When I was trying out for brass band, I'd go there almost every week. But now I just borrow the school's drumkit.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I wonder how the owner's doing...

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Actually, I think I'll visit soon! I need to get a drumkit of my own, anyway.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Somehow…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (Ugh, I came all the way out here, but I still can't decide…)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (If I go to shopping mall, I can go to that one curry place Ami recommended, but then it'll take an extra time to go to the grocery store and get groceries…)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (But if I get groceries first, it might take too long, and they'll close for the night…)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (But it shouldn't take me that long, unless there's a line…)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (But do I really want to carry around groceries all the way across the city?)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ah, sorry, sorry!! I'm going…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …I'm real behind.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You miss one lesson, and everyone in English is suddenly Shakespeare.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: But I can't keep relying on Toshiki… and I don't think anyone else in the class wants to share their notes.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Whatever. Self-study it is.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I hope that one guitar place's still open. They had strings for a good price.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I really need to get back into practice. It's been so long since I last played properly, I've lost my callouses.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (And everyone's been so diligent about their instruments… I can't mess this up for them too.)

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (Toshiki's right. This is a good place to practice.)

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (I thought it would be busy, but it's empty on this side. And it's an open area. I can be sure that no one's following me…)

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (…I need to get over myself.)

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (If we're going to perform as a band, I can't be holding them back.)

speaker: 13em
dialogue: (Everything's gotten so lively all of a sudden.)

speaker: 13em
dialogue: (It's *so* annoying. Seriously, who the hell do they think they are?)

speaker: 13em
dialogue: (I was doing fine before they showed up. They desecrated my place just so they can practice.)

speaker: 13em
dialogue: (…At least they're entertaining. If they ever get boring, I'm kicking em out.)

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: A-one, and a-two, and—

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: (Yay! I got the kick and twirl right! Usually I spin too much and mess up my position for the next part.)

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: (I can probably get this part down by the end of the day!—)

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: *Distant explosion*

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: (Boo… I spoke too soon…)

speaker: 15msm
dialogue: Oh, this display…

speaker: 15msm
dialogue: (I put up a sign not to mess with the exhibits, but someone's been in here. The belt on this stanchion isn't supposed to connect here.)

speaker: 15msm
dialogue: *click*

speaker: 15msm
dialogue: (…Good. They need to learn to rebel a little.)

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hi~ro~shi! Thanks for coming!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You're lucky I haven't been escorted out yet. Why couldn't I just meet you at the gate?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: But the teacher wanted me for something, and you would've had to wait outside for a while. At least here you can sit down and relax.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ?!?!?! That's it?!?!?! I could've gotten kicked out!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Well, you didn't, so it all worked out in the end. Let's go!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, let's get out of here…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hiroshi!!!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh, sure. Just come on in. Not like you'll get me in trouble if anyone sees you.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Relax, it's not like anyone cares. Besides, you got to see my campus, so I wanna see yours!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You can see my school when we have the festival. Just wait at the gate next time.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Waaaah… I'm so lonely… Hiroshi doesn't want to hang out with me…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: We're literally going to meet up with Yurina and Raika right now.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Oh yeah. Yay ★

speaker: 1m
dialogue: So yeah, I had to do the homework during my lunch period. It sucked.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: On the bright side, I totally thought I was going to get a 0, but look! I passed★

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You got a 70%, what are you so proud for? Do your homework on time.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Not what you're supposed to say. You should be praising me for my quick thinking, or for working well under pressure.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ...Ok. Since you're such a genius, how about you help me with my math homework?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Bet!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (She agreed to that way too quickly...)

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I was thinking, what if we made flyers?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Flyers? We don't even have any sets ready.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I mean, yeah, but for practice! For when we do put on a set!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I'd rather practice beatmatching. The part that people actually care about?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: You're no fun… I *know* that. It's about manifesting it for us! Believing in ourselves!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …I'll think about it. Raika might be better at graphic design, though.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Ooooh, Hiroshi, look!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: A capsule machine? I don't know any of these characters.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Me neither! But the blue one with the face mask looks cool.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Aww, didn't get her… Hiroshi, you like can badges, you should try!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I'm not gonna waste my money on a character I don't even know. What are you going to do with that?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Uh… I was gonna give it to you.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Figured. Maybe you can make something out of it.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I wonder how big this place actually is?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I mean, the main area isn't that much bigger than VISR's, but I don't think I've explored the entire back yet.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Dude, this place is huge as is. I've been to livehouses smaller than this place's lobby.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: It's just that half of the space is a mess. I don't think we can get past all those cables without shears.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah, maybe we should focus on where we are now.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina!!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Mayuko? What's up? I don't think we're meeting today—

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Wanna come with me to the music shop? age of audio's new single is out!!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I'm just on my way to buy it! There's a deluxe edition too, but there's a limited amount, so I wanted to try and—

speaker: 1m
dialogue: You already got it?!?!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Ha! Who's DIOS' number one fan now?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …Hey, I'm just kidding. I bought it in a moment of weakness. Here.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Really? I can just have it?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, I'm not gonna use it. I'll just get a download if I need a copy.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina!!!!!!!!!! Thank you!! You're the best!!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina, you're always so busy. How'd you do it? You must be super popular!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You're giving me too much credit. I'm not *that* popular…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Honestly, it's mostly talking to people. Keep putting yourself out there, and someone will take you up.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's even better if someone else puts in a good word for you. Then you really need to do your best.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Oh, really? That's easy★ Can you put a good word for Hiro and I?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Uh… Let's save making connections for later. First, you have to actually know what you're doing.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (Also, I don't think my word really means anything…)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You don't need to jump right into trying CDJs, y'know. A regular controller is fine for now, and way cheaper.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Really? Phew! I thought I'd have to save up again.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You said you bought a new guitar recently, too… Do you usually buy stuff on a whim?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hey, I'm not that careless. Obviously I save my money.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I've wanted this specific model for a *long* time, so it's not like I have any regrets. If I needed a CDJ, I would've just saved up for that too.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I don't think you realize how much that would cost… But at least you have some self-control.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Mayuko, you have a dog too?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yep! Actually, he just kinda shows up around our neighborhood, but he's basically mine. He really likes me.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: His name is Bandit. He's got these cool markings around his face, it makes him look like he's wearing a bandit mask!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Never heard of a breed with markings like that. Mine's a corgi, but my brother was boring. He named him Fido.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: That's cute though!! They should meet up! Once I get Bandit on a collar, we can have a puppy playdate!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Does he not have a collar..?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I mean, I bought one for him. But everytime I try to put it on, he gets super mean and growls at me.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (Growls?!)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …Uh, sure. I'll think about it.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (Sorry Mayuko, but your dog doesn't really sound tame…)

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina, have you ever been here before? Like, before we showed you this place.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Uh, no. Why?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Just curious! I mean, Miku said something about another SEKAI owner, but whenever I try to ask, she just tells me to buzz off.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: So I've been trying to investigate! How about Raika, do you think it's her?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: ...Yeah, no, I don't think she's going to entertain that. She'll probably tell you to focus on your sets.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Aww... That was all my leads.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: ...Hey, be careful who you talk to about SEKAI. Miku barely tolerates us as is, she's not gonna want anyone else involved.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I am careful! Whatever, I'll just talk to Hiroshi, he's smart.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I bet I could drive. I'd be so good at driving.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: ? Where is this coming from? Has Yurina been giving you ideas?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: No, I was just thinking about it while waiting for the light to turn green.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: If I could drive, I could be a tour bus driver and drive bands around! It's like, being paid for backstage access!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You do realize that there's a separate license for driving a bus. That'll take years to get.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I *know* that, I'm just thinking about it. It's called planning for the future.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Wait, what was that about Yurina? Does *she* know how to drive?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Nevermind, ignore that. Don't start driving until you're old enough for a license.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: This place again? Don't you go anywhere else?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: What's wrong with it? You said you liked their sandwiches, didn't you?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Well, yeah, but it gets boring going to the same place everyday.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're just like Yurina. I'm not trying to be exciting. I'm just here to get my coffee and go.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I know! There's a super cool crepe place down the street. I'll grab you one!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No thanks.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Ok, well I want crepes, so I'm going anyway. Be right back!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Mayuko!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …And she's gone. Seriously, that girl can't sit still for a minute.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hey Raika, the guys in this ad… didn't they play at VISR before? Like, a super long time ago?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Oh, you remember them? It must've been years ago... They used to be regulars before they got signed on.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Wow… And now their music's being played everywhere…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Raika, you're so cool★

speaker: 4r
dialogue: ? Why are you telling me this? I'm not part of the band.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah, but like, you basically helped get them off the ground. You're like, a part of their origin story!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'm not that important. There's no shortage of venues for people to perform at.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'm glad it worked out for them, though. They really put in their all. I knew they'd get somewhere.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: (Hehe, she's being sentimental…)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Ok, we need to lay down some ground rules if we're going to practice in SEKAI.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No getting on the stage until I check it over. Even if Miku gives you the okay.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No trying to fix anything on your own if it's broken.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No breaking into rooms that aren't unlocked.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No getting Yurina to break into rooms that aren't unlocked.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Seriously, all these rules… It's not like the SEKAI's going to explode on us.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You don't know that, and I'm not going to risk it. God knows what safety measures Miku cut corners on.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Anyway, no pressing any buttons you don't know—

speaker: 1m
dialogue: And shouldn't Hiroshi be here for this too?!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hehe…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're in a good mood today. Did something happen?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Not really. I was just thinking…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: In the past, I used to see people perform up on stage, and go to and from practice, and hang out in livehouses…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Being online is fun and all, but I wanted to be a part of that, you know?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: ...You'll get there, Mayuko.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: No, I mean, it feels like I've gotten it.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I'm glad you and Yurina are helping us with this. Without you two, I think we'd be, like, really lost.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …I'm happy to hear it, Mayuko. I'll do my best for you.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You're emphasizing the wrong syllable. You're saying it like you're producing a track.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's a noun, so you have to say it like PRO-duce. Like, [i]there's a discount on the produce here.[/i]

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …I'm cooked. The oral exam's tomorrow. No way am I going to figure this out by then.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: What? No, don't say that. Other than that, you're doing fine.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I'm just nitpicking. She probably won't care about stuff like that.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Really?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Beats me. I don't pay attention to the rubric. English is like, the one class I don't have to worry about.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ...Great. Thanks anyway, Yurina.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: So like. Is there a reason why Raika's always looking at you like that?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: The fuck? What does that even mean?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You know. Like you're going to do something stupid if she's not watching you 24/7.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Oh, that. Nah, she's just a control freak. She's like that with everyone she's worked with. I think it's a liability thing.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I don't really mind, though, if it makes her feel better. It's not like I'm planning on throwing myself into the crowd.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: That's… so interesting.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I might have to go back and buy one of those windbreakers. I really liked the red one's design.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You're not gonna get one?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: They're nice, I guess... Wish I could actually wear them to school, though.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Ugh, I feel you. They'd totally get confiscated. Actually, I can't stand the whole uniform thing in general.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I got a warning for wearing a t-shirt under my blazer the other day. Like, I had a gig right after! Did they want me to show up in my school uniform?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Right? I mean, I only go outside for school, but it'd be nice to wear what I want, at least.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: That's why we have to get you out of the house more. So you can wear clothes you like, instead of being stuck in uniform all the time.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ugh… I guess when you put it like that…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: What the hell was that for? You completely ditched me.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Sorryyyy… Something came up, that's all.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Was it so urgent that you couldn't even give me a headsup? What were you even doing?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …I just saw someone I didn't want to talk to.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You were *hiding*?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I was being considerate! If she saw that I was here, it would've become a whole thing. I didn't want to ruin your day.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Nevermind. I don't even want to know what drama you're involved in.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Honestly, I think you've got the hang of this! Maybe we'll try putting you in front of a crowd next.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, don't look so pale. It doesn't need to be on a big stage like VISR.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Most of the time, I'm doing events and parties. And in that case, no one's gonna focus too hard on you.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Really? I guess that sounds managable…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Exactly! Nothing to worry about. You're just there to keep the music playing and the energy high.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: As long as you don't make any stupid decisions, no one'll even look at you.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: —In the sense that, you're not gonna make any stupid decisions.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ahhhhhhhh…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: What happened here? The plastic on this is all blackened.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh yeah. The panel started smoking when Raika was testing her setup.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Raika wanted to check around for a replacement, so we just kept it here for now…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Oh, I think I might've seen something like that in the back. If you want, I can drag it out here and we can try to install it?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh. Actually, that would be really helpful.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I don't know how Raika would feel about us trying to install it on our own, though…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I know she means well, but you don't need her permission for everything. She worries too much as is.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Besides, I know what I'm doing. I'll be the trusted adult.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Okay, fine. Lead the way.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hiroshi, I didn't see you at lunch the other day. Is everything ok?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: —?!? We don't even eat together, why are you keeping track of where I spend lunch?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You say that like you're hard to find. You usually sit in the same spot, so I noticed when you weren't there.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ok, first of all, still weird. Second of all, I was studying with a classmate yesterday. I don't need to be micromanaged, or whatever you're doing.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …That's on me. Sorry about that, Hiroshi. I'm used to keeping tabs on Yurina.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You're good. Though I don't think she needs to be micromanaged, either.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: It's not *micromanaging.* It's making sure she's not slacking off. It's what any good friend would do.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …If you say so.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Are you okay?! Were they harassing you?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: No, not really… I just couldn't find a way out of the conversation.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: God, I can't stand those types of people. Hiroshi, don't let them corner you like that, okay?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I was trying to get away, but they didn't get the hint… I didn't want to be rude…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Don't be afraid to be rude to them. They know that you're uncomfortable and they don't care.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Or if you don't want to talk, you don't have to tell them off outright. Just do your best not to engage. Hide in a store you need to.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Sorry. I mean, that you had to save me.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Oh, don't say that. It's not your fault you didn't know what to do.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Just be careful. There are too many dangerous people out there.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Thanks for picking it up, Hiroshi. I owe you one— Wait…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Huh? Did I get the wrong thing? You wanted a black coffee, right?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No, it's right. Was the cafe I told you about closed?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Yeah, it was. I didn't want to come back emptyhanded, so…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No worries. Yurina's been telling me to try somewhere new anyway.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Let's catch up with the others. I'll pay you back when we get to VISR, ok?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Right, yeah…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (How the hell did she tell so quickly? She hardly even looked at the cup.)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You know, I'm surprised I haven't seen you at VISR before.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I remember seeing Mayuko, but I don't think I've seen you around. Unless I don't remember you..?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I just don't go to livehouses unless Mayuko drags me into it.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Honestly, I can't stand crowds. I'm awful at cheering. I ruin the energy just being there.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're one person, you're not ruining anything. What matters is that you're enjoying yourself.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Still, I want to support them properly. If someone built up the courage to perform and the crowd didn't reciprocate, it would be super discouraging.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: As long as you aren't there to boo them, I don't see the problem.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: In my opinion, you're supporting them just by buying a ticket. You should come by more often.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I guess when you put it like that…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (…Still, I think she has a bit of an agenda.)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Woah…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Did you set this up?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Mhm. The visualizations are generated live. The footage is prerecorded, though.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Really, it's not that impressive. It's meant to supplement an actual performance, but I figured I'd test out my VJing setup here.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Still, even if the music's not live, it's really immersive…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Um… Is that panel supposed to look like it's shorting out?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …No. No it's actually shorting out. Fuck.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hiroshi, can you—

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I'll get the fire extinguisher.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Seriously? You got a warning *again*?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Just wear a jacket over the uniform if you hate it that much.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's not about that, it's about making a statement. It's not like what I wear affects my learning or anything.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: It's about picking your battles. Besides, they won't let you wear whatever you want to the workplace either.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Exactly. They should let us cherish our youth, and let me wear my band merch to school.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Ugh. Fine, do what you want.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (We're at a standoff…)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (I can't believe this. She's being dense on purpose.)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …*sigh*

speaker: 4r
dialogue: CanIhaveyourphysicsnotesfromyesterday.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Oh, so that's why you've been so quiet all lunch. I thought you were about to confess~

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Because it should be obvious?! Do you think I ditch school because I feel like it?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I just wanted to hear you say it. How am I supposed to know what you want if you don't use your words? Communication, Raika.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (That's rich, coming from you.)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …Right. Thanks. I just hope this isn't on today's quiz.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Of course. Uh, I wrote some of it in English, so let me know if you're confused.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Sanae is so responsible.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: She's on the student council and the disciplinary committee, and she's always helping out in class…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Huh? I mean, yeah, but what she does have to do with anything—

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You can't even tell someone when you have to cancel a gig!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Seriously, can you *please* start showing up? I can't have people at VISR's door because they get in contact with you.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …Right. Yeah, got it.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: (Yeah, she's clueless. But I can't out Sanae like that…)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Do you always go to the same cafe? Don't you get bored?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Not really. They have a quick turnaround time, and the atmosphere is nice. I like to answer emails here.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Makes sense. I think I'd feel bad if the workers started preparing my order in advance, though.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: What's bad about that? We both know what I want, so it's efficient for everyone.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: What if you want to try something new? Or they change the recipe, and you don't like it anymore? Then you're betraying them.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Seriously? Stop worrying about hypotheticals and eat your creme bun.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Alright, alright. But I'm taking you to a cafe of my choice next time.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …I kinda wonder what this place was like before we showed up.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Cleaner, I'd hope.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: No, I'm serious. Miku said something about another SEKAI owner, right? So maybe it looked different then?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: If I knew how long ago they left, maybe we can figure out a timeline—

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Yurina, I'm not the one to talk to about this.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'm only here because I don't want Mayuko and Hiroshi to get hurt. I don't care about whoever was here before. Talk to one of them about your theories.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …Fair enough. Just curious.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: What are you doing?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Organizing. The place is a mess. If we're going to practice here, we should at least have a platform we can work with.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: The hell?? You already have VISR to manage. Tell Miku to do it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Miku doesn't care. She said so herself. It'll only be another hour, then I'll head out.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: No way. You're not doing this alone. Let me help.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …Fine. These are ethernet cables, can you take these the storage closet? There's a box labeled ethernet on the bottom shelf.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: On it~!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, this is kinda nostalgic, isn't it? Remember when we had to do a bunch of chores overnight?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Nostaglic for *you*, maybe. I had to make sure my dad didn't find out about the teenagers crashing on VISR's couch.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yep. Good times.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Mi~ku!

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Ugh...

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Don't 'ugh...' me! I need your advice! Does the synth sound good here?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: What makes you think I have anything useful to say? I told you, I don't do music anymore.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Because you have ears. Now listen.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: It would be good if I could actually focus on the synth. The drums are too distracting. It's just a bunch of noise fighting for my attention.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: But other than that, it's good? Yay! Thanks, Miku!

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Yeah yeah, whatever. Come back when you mix this properly.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hey Miku! Guess what Yurina got for me!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Actually, she got it for herself, but then she gave it to me anyway. Love her, she's great.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: I don't care. Go bother Hiroshi about it.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Ta-da! age of audio's new single, deluxe edition!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I don't even want to open it!! The packaging is *so* pretty! Don't you think the cover looks super cool!?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: And the vocalist, DIOS, he's literally incredible. I don't know how someone has that much talent. I've been following him since day one, and he has *never* missed.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: So yeah, I'm basically his number one fan—

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Miku? Hey, where are you going?!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: (So rude… Even for her.)

speaker: 2h
dialogue: So like. What do you even do?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: That's rude.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I mean, you say you run this place, but there hasn't been anyone here for a while. So did you just… stand around?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: So what, I need a purpose to exist? That's what you're saying? What about you, what do *you* do?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: That's not even what I meant!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ugh, nevermind. Forget I said anything.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Okay, internet should be up again. Is it working?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yep, it is. Thanks, Miku. That was surprisingly helpful of you.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Is *everything* a backhanded remark with you?! Can't you say thank you like a normal person?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Sorry. It's just, I thought you'd ignore me again.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: …Yeah, that's fair. Actually, I just wanted the internet back so I can check Twitter.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ?! You have a Twitter? Is that allowed??

speaker: 13em
dialogue: No one's stopped me yet. Also, you really should get USBs for your sets. You can't rely on streaming forever.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Okay okay, I'll get on that. Thanks again.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Now I kinda wanna know her handle…)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It sucks that we can't take your things to the real world. I wanna try those CDJs in somewhere like VISR.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: You are actually shameless. Those are *my* things, they're not just for you to take wherever.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: But it's not like you even use them. I'd return them after, and you wouldn't even know they were gone.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: And I'm helping you clean up at the same time! It's like a trade. My labor for your equipment.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: I didn't ask you to do that. Don't take my things without permission.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, yeah, point recieved.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Miku, your wires are all super frayed. Isn't there a better way to tie them up?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Look, I did the best I could. I had to use cable ties to get it to stay in place. It's too dense to do anything with.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: We could try braiding them! Or keeping it up in a bun? Could be cute~

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hmph. I'd like to see you try.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Bet. I'll buy some more cable ties and be back tomorrow.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Ugh… I walked into that.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Fine. But no cutting anything, and no dying my hair.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Did you do all this?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're welcome. Took forever to sort all those wires. Did you really just dump everything into one big storage bin?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: So what if I did? Why are you even here, anyway? Don't you have a venue to run?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Nothing's scheduled for today, so I have time.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: And *someone* has to do something about this mess. I'm not going to let Hiroshi and Mayuko run around on a messy stage, whether it's here or VISR.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hmph. Whatever. Your problem now.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Huh?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: (I was going to get rid of all the boxes here, but someone beat me to it?)

speaker: 13em
dialogue: There. I did my part. Now get out of here.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Why did you do that? I had set out the rest of my afternoon to—

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Yeah, that's the point. If you're not driving yourself crazy over VISR, you're driving yourself crazy over this place.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: So I handled this room for you. Now get out. Enjoy your youth.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: This is just one room. The rest of the SEKAI is still a giant mess—

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Raika. Get out. Or I'll make you.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …Jesus, no need to be dramatic. I'm leaving.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Wahhhhh… I'm hopeless… I'm nothing…

speaker: 13em
dialogue: !? Hiroshi, why's Mayuko on the floor? Is she okay??

speaker: 2h
dialogue: She failed her math quiz yesterday. Just give her a couple of days and let her do her thing.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: That's it? She looks like she watched someone die.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hey, get up. You're just gonna sit here and mope around for the next week?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: *sniff* Yes… This is a good place to mope.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: It was only one quiz, right? That doesn't make you nothing. Just figure out what you did wrong and do better next time.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hiroshi can help you study. Hiroshi, you gonna help her study, right?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Huh? I mean, yeah, sure. If she's up for it.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: See? You're basically guaranteed to get a good grade on the next one.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Okay! Let's study right now!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Wait, right now?!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah! If I'm going to get better, I need to start studying for the next one ASAP! I'll go get my textbooks!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …And she's gone. Seriously, Miku, be careful. You're lucky she didn't crash harder.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: And you need to tell her what she needs to hear.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: …Okay, okay, I'll be careful next time. At least she pulled herself together.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: You two were working together on music?! Without me?!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: We weren't working *together.* We were literally just in the same room. Half of the time she was scrolling Twitter.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: That's totally together!! Miku never hangs out with me!

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Yeah, cuz you talk my head off. At least Hiroshi knows when to be quiet.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: No fair. You probably told him to be quiet, and he was too nice to say no.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: That's not what happened.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Oh. Still not fair!!!

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Ugh. If you wanted to join us, then you could've just asked, instead of making a big fuss of it.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Wait, really? Yay ★ Can I join?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Too late. I'm exhausted. You two have fun.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Miku!!!!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Good job. You scared her off.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Mi~ku! Do you have any blank CDs? Yurina's gonna show me how to burn music.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Why are you asking me? Just get your own.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Seriously? Nothing in that giant storage room of yours?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: That room is off-limits. I'm still sorting everything into boxes.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: But *are* there any CDs? I don't mind have to clean up a little!

speaker: 13em
dialogue: …You're better off just buying some. It's too much work for you two.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's work that someone has to do anyway. If we help out a little, can we use your CDs?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: …Fine. But you stop when I tell you. Don't be like Raika.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yay★ Cleaning up★

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Only you would be excited to be cleaning...

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina, why don't you try producing again? Hiroshi and I can help!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, no, I'm really out of practice. It'll just sound bad. I'll stick to using others' music.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I bet it wasn't bad! If you were working with DIOS, you have to be good★

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I know, how about you show me your demos? Then I can judge for sure~

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Real subtle, Mayuko.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: *Miku!!!*

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, nice try. I wouldn't be allowed to show you, anyway.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hmph. Thanks a lot, Miku. I almost had it.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: You didn't have shit. Yurina's not stupid like that.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Miku? Is that you up there?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Woah! I didn't know there was a walkway above the stage!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Mi~ku! Can you hear us?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Ugh. Give me a second. And stay behind the tape, you'll get something dropped on you.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Miku, I didn't know you could climb like that! Since when?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: What do you mean, since when? Did you forget this is *my* stage?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Anyway, I was just fixing a floodlight. Not a big deal.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: At least tie your hair back if you're going to be on the catwalk. It could snag on something while you're working.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Yeah yeah, I know that. You guys have fun.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Absolutely not, Mayuko.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Aww…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Wh— *Mayuko*!! I told you not to perform on stage until I gave you the all clear!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I did get the all clear though!!

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Yeah, from me. She's fine.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No, no, no! Mayuko, cut the music. We haven't done a proper inspection. Who knows how any of those panels were kept.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Come *on.* Do you seriously think I'd let her hurt herself?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah, Miku's not that mean. And we were having fun so far!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'll believe it when I see Miku actually take care of her venue. Music off. Clear the stage.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Aww…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Woah, you have a whole collection going on here! I didn't know about any of these singles.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, makes sense. These were before they broke up, and they took all their music from that era off streaming.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Some of these I got before they rebranded, but this one took forever to find online. I had to bid— um, way too much.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, that's cool. You get bragging rights for being an original age of audio fan.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hiroshi, can…

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Can I borrow one of these?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Uh… I mean, they took me a while to get. Why?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: I want to see what's so good about them.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …I mean. If you're careful, and give it back in time…

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Is this afternoon good?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh, then that's okay. Knock yourself out.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Cool. Thanks.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Fuck. Should I have done that?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's probably fine. It's not like Miku's gonna wreck your things on purpose.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hiroshi.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Hm?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh, my CD!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Thanks for bringing it back in one piece.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: See? Told you, Miku wouldn't smash your things.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: The hell? What kind of animal do you guys take me for?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I just said that you *wouldn't* smash his CDs. I'm defending you.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Sorry… I was worried about this all afternoon. I mean, it's the only copy I have of age of audio's old music.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: …You don't like their new music?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Well… Their new releases are cool, but there's something about their earlier work. It speaks to me more.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Or maybe I'm just nostalgic.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Nothing wrong with that. People change their style all the time.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's like, even if you try to replicate your old sound, you can't replicate the headspace you were in.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: It's why I don't produce anymore. No point in trying to force yourself to like it if you don't.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: …Hm.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, that's how I feel too.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hmm… Anything?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No, still nothing…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ? What's going on here?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Trying to figure out why the speakers aren't getting any sound.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Can I see?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No, it's okay, Miku and I can handle it…

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Go ahead, I'm sick of sitting here. I'm taking a break.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: What— Miku! You can't just dump your work on others.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Solo's active on this channel.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hm? Solo shouldn't affect the main mix, though.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: It says SIP. That shouldn't be on, right? I'm turning it off.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Oh. Ohhhhhh. Yeah, that's my bad.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …You cannot be serious. Why are you using this mixer for live sound?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hey, if it works, it works. At least we figured it out.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: What the hell's going on here?? Are you two trying to torture me?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Sorry…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No, don't be sorry. How else do you expect to learn to ring out the room?

speaker: 13em
dialogue: More like he's ringing out my ears. I'm going mad in here from all the feedback.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: If Miku's bothered by it, shouldn't we just do this in VISR?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I mean, it's not like she can leave SEKAI, so if she's really bothered…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …I see what you mean.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: *Thank you.* See, at least Hiroshi has a heart.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Fine. But we'll have to find another day to do this, if that's okay with you.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, that's fine. Thanks anyway.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, Miku, what are your thoughts on a sleepover?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Yurina, don't bother Miku. This is a venue, not a hotel.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You said the same thing about VISR, but you let me sleep over plenty. Besides, not like there's anyone else here.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: And it was fun back then! Could be more fun without needing to be chased out the next morning.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: I don't know what you find so fun about sleeping on the couch, in a room without proper heating, instead of facing your problems.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: And you, don't act all responsible. You're just as bad, indulging her like that.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: …So is that a no to the sleepover, or…

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Hmph. Do what you want. It's your SEKAI now.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: What's her issue? Seriously, what a load of yap.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, Raika, don't take her to heart. Miku's just being sour. I mean, what does she know, anyway?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I guess…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey Miku, I found this in one of the rooms. Is this yours?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: ! That guitar...

speaker: 13em
dialogue: You can have it.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Really? Usually, you kick a fuss about anyone using your things.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: No one here plays it anymore. Just take it. Smash it on stage, or something.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: No one's smashing anything on stage.

speaker: 13em
dialogue: Fine, do whatever you want with it. Just don't expect me to play you anything. Bye.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Blah, I'm no good at this. You think Mayuko will teach me how to play guitar?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're already teaching her how to DJ. Just give that to me, I'll keep it safe.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I mean, dunno what you're gonna do with a guitar, but sure.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: So they're cupids, but they kill people?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Nonono, they just have guns instead of bows. Their goal is still to help people fall in love, but sometimes they get into gunfights with each other.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …Still, it's really, really good. It's been on my cosplan list for a while.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Hmm… They do look nice. I like the white-haired look.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I'll check it out, then. Can I borrow your copy?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: !!! Yes, of course! I have the other volumes, too.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: For our weapons, I was thinking we could make them with EVA foam and PVC pipes, and then airbrush it so it looks smooth, so that…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: —Wait, hold on, we can't be walking around with fake weapons! We'll cause a panic!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …Where'd you get that?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: This button pin? A girl in my class gave it to me. Do you know what this is supposed to be?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: "age of audio"… no, I never heard of it. It looks, um, homemade.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: That's putting it nicely. I think she got confused and thought we were trading. I just wanted to give her my business card.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …Why did you have business cards?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: What do you mean? For networking, obviously. If I want to survive in the real world, I'll need to make connections.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: (I think you're both confused…)

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh, look at that! Miku's on the big screen up there.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: It looks like she's having a concert soon. How does that work? No way it's like our Miku, right..?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, not like that. It's all prerecorded, and they use holograms to make it look like she's real.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Still, it's really fun. It's basically the same as a regular concert. I still have my lightsticks from a couple years ago.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Hm… I've always wanted to go to a concert, but I don't think I should be buying tickets right now.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Besides, we have our own Miku. I bet she'd love to give us a show. Maybe we should set up our own concert in SEKAI.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: That's a fun idea… I'll let her know.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Koharu, have you ever been here?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: A sewing lounge? I haven't heard of this before…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It's a really nice place. I came here once, but the sewing machines are too complicated for me... You might like it, though.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I don't blame you, they're *difficult*. It took me a long time just to learn how to load the bobbin.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I know, how about we go together? I can teach you how to set it up, and we could get some work done.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …If you promise not to get annoyed.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Of course I won't! We'll make a day of it, it'll be fun.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh, you look perfect!! Exactly how I imagined!!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Again, thank you so much for doing this! I promise this won't take up too much time. After this, you'll be free.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Really, it's fine… Actually, I should be thanking you. I've never been a model before.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Of course! I hope you like the clothes.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I've only ever modeled for myself and my little sister, so I really wanted to try designing for someone new.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Still, you did really well. It's cool you can make your own clothes.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I mean, I can draw, but to have your designs in real life…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I figured it can only help my portfolio. I can't make everything I design, though, so I have to pick my best.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Alright! Photoshoot time. Follow me, I found a good spot.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Honestly, I don't know how safe it is to store our cosplays here.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: It only takes MEIKO collapsing the wrong building, and all our work would be for nothing.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: But SEKAI goes back to normal when Miku and MEIKO finish fighting, right? So they should be okay?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Yes, but it still feels risky… and I don't want to wait for them just to grab our things.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: That's true… If we need to, I can probably save our outfits in my room. My parents won't mind.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Really? Don't you have your model kit collection?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I've been meaning to take them down to dust my shelves. I can rearrange my room while I'm at it and make space.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: *sigh* Thanks, Chiyomi. At least we won't have to worry about debris in our clothes.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Do you really need to sprint the rest of the way here? You spend half of the commute on the bus, anyway.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Of course I do! The bus is slow enough as is, I can't keep everyone waiting.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You'll just wear yourself out before we can even start the meeting. The five minutes you save isn't worth it.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: D'aww, Koharu, you're so considerate! But seriously, it's fine. It's actually pretty fun.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I like to time myself and see how fast it takes me to make it. My best time is 4.49, but that was because it was a half day and there wasn't much crowd.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You sound like a racehorse. I don't understand how people just run for fun.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: It's not that bad! A good jog is about as intensive as dancing is, anyway.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I know, how about we go on a run together one day? I know some good routes on the way here!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Eugh… sorry, not worth it.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Honestly, the twist was awful. Not only did it come out of nowhere, but it wasn't even permanent??

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I mean, why not commit to it?! Why does she just get to walk it off?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, that's fair. This director's known for some pretty dark stuff, so I think it's supposed to be a bait-and-switch.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: It's like, 'There's no way *this guy* is writing such a happy premise! There has to be some catch!'

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Hmph. I guess… I still feel kinda robbed, though.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I know, how about we watch some of his other shows in the meanwhile? Chiyomi really likes his work.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Well, if you two think it's good. As long as it doesn't waste my time.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Sanae, you seem distracted. Are you looking for someone?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hm? Oh, sorry Koharu. I thought my brother would be around here, but I don't see him anywhere…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: There's another one?! I thought it was just you and your sisters.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yep! His name's Toshiki. Usually he's out here practicing violin. He's really serious about it, I think.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh, so he's a street musician. I just assumed he was Yuuka's age.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Nah, he's in your grade. He just kinda does his own thing, though. I mean, you know how boys get when they grow up.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hey, if we see him, I'll introduce you! You two would totally get along!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I mean, if he's okay with it… I don't want to impose on his practice.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (He's a violinist? That's really impressive. I wonder what he's like…)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (Oh! Sanae is there. Looks like she went shopping—)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (IS SHE BLEEDING?????? BLEEDING FROM THE MOUTH??????)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: SANAE???

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Huh? Oh! Hi Koharu, nice seeing you here!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: What the hell happened to you??? Why are you bleeding??

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Haha, about that… I was in a rush to buy groceries, and I tripped on the pavement.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But there was a sale on vegatables, so it was worth it.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Are you insane? Do you think you're being cute, walking around with a split lip? Come with me, I'll ask one of the stores if they have bandages.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: You really don't have to—

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Don't even start with that. Come on.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: It was nice running into you, Koharu! Hope I didn't pull you away from anything important.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No, it's nothing like that. I had to come out here to pick up a package. I thought I'd pay utilities while I'm at it, too.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Pay utilities..?! Don't you live with your aunts?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Yes? I can't just live with them for free. Everyone has to pull their weight.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: That's just like you…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But even so, can't you just give them your share directly? Why go through all the hassle of coming out here?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Honestly, it just feels more proper. Like I'm an actual tenant.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: When we're adults, we'll have to do something like this, right? I might as well get used to it now.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: That's… well, it's a little weird. I don't think anyone looks forward to paying the bills.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: If it were me, I'd pay them directly just to avoid the convinence store fee.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ugh, I know… It's fine. That's just life.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: (She's younger than me, and already acting like an adult… It kinda gets me down.)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Sanae, when you plan choreo, is there a methodology to it? Or do you just do whatever feels right?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Umm… a bit of both, I guess? Sometimes, I'll have a really clear idea for a certain part, and then it's just figuring out how to get there.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But honestly, I just study others. I think most of my ideas are osmosised, anyway.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Like, you know at the end of PrePure episodes, when they do that dance sequence?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I skip those.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: For real?! Akari and Yuuka love them. I think they practice it in their own time.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Of course they would, they're the target audience. It's not like it's relevant to the plot.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Well, don't tell the others, but I stole some moves from there. Sue me.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Right… well, as long as you're having fun.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, Koharu! Wanna eat lunch together? I got us some chips from the school store.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: So quickly?! Lunch just started, isn't the line really long?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Um, are you forgetting who you're talking to? All I had to do was ask, and everyone graciously stepped aside for me.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Perks of being the most popular girl in school. You're welcome, by the way.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You got out of class early. You know, you're only supposed to leave class if you have an actual reason for it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Blah, I have to leave after lunch, anyway. Can't you just play along? I still got you something.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I'd appreciate it more if you didn't make up an entire fantasy to go along with it.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: But sure, we can eat together. Thanks for the snack.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Wow, aren't we smart? We got the same answers on these problems.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Looks like I had nothing to worry about. Thanks for checking anyway, Koharu~

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Kaori, how long did you work on this for?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Huh? Like, an hour or something. Like I said, it was easy work. Why?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Because I was waiting for you to call me out on using the wrong formula. All of these are wrong.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Seriously?! All of them-?!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, so you were giving me the wrong answers? Not cool, Koharu.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You're telling me! You'd realize this if you had studied!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: What was the plan, anyway? It's not like you would've understood the concept just by looking at my answers.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I was going to work backwards…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ugh. Fine, I'll explain one of them. But the rest, you're redoing on your own.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sigh…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Kaori, have you heard of this anime?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh, I've seen this one around online. I didn't realize they did billboards, too.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Makes sense, though. It's an idol mobage, so they definitely have the money. They got some big names in this project.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh, so it's not an anime. That's a shame, the animations looked interesting.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, why not give it a shot? Just cause it's a gacha doesn't mean it can't have a good story.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Actually, I've been in a few titles myself. It was pretty fun, I got to work with a lot of interesting people~

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Wait, really?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …No, you're just messing with me again. Besides, I'm not going to start gambling just to support you.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sigh… Caught once more.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Huh. I've never had boba before. I wonder if the black tea here's any good.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Seriously? Like, ever? Were there no boba spots in your old town?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Not really. There was probably some in the city, but I never bothered to go and try it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Damn. You gotta keep up, Koharu. Imagine if you were in the industry and they found out you never had boba. They'd laugh you out of the interview.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: They're not going to ask me about my boba preferences in an interview. Be real.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I'm being so real. If you want to be a fashion designer, you need to keep up with the trends, or you'll get torn apart.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Ripped to shreds by the masses, fed to the sharks, forced to work retail forever…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ok I get it, I'm uncultured. Are you going to order?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, that wasn't so bad. You remembered the second part, at least.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ugh… I can't follow all these steps. How do you get this down so quickly?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Please, this is light work for me. When I was an idol, they used to give me half an hour to learn a routine. If I didn't get it down by then, then I didn't get lunch.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: ...That's concerning, actually. Aren't there laws against that?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, but you see, my producer was involved with a shadow government—

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh my god. Nevermind, you're actually full of shit.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Ha… Sorry I bailed on you there, Koharu.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No worries. It's nothing to be sorry about, those girls wanted your autograph, not mine.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, I mean, obviously. Of course, anyone would be honored to see the brilliant Kaori Umetsu on her off-time~

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You know, you should consider yourself blessed. There are people out there who would die to know me.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Are you okay? You look stressed out.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Uh, why wouldn't I be? It was barely five minutes. It's nothing.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: —?! What are you doing??

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Fixing your glasses. We don't need more people recognizing you while you're off the clock.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You know, we can still go to SEKAI, if you want. At least there you can have some peace of mind.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Nah, it's fine. Really.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Besides, we already came all the way here, might as well enjoy the fresh air!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …If you say so.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ugh… I wish MEIKO would get a grip. It's not like we're leaving anytime soon.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Honestly, I wonder what she's trying to do.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I mean, if her goal is to destroy SEKAI, wouldn't it make more sense for her to target us? Fighting Miku seems like a waste of time.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Don't give her ideas… If I come here and get kidnapped, I'll give her a piece of my mind.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I don't think you can give her much else. No offense, but you're seriously lacking in the strength department.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No offense,' she says…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I wonder if we should do something for the cultural festival. They allow other students to visit, so I'd be able to blend in perfectly.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: They'll only allow others in on the second day, so probably not...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: ...Maybe I could get away with it?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha, nevermind. I don't want to stress you out or anything. I'll probably be busy with the Kamiyama cultural festival, anyway...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But don't hold me to that! I'll find a way. Probably.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Ok, if you're sure…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahh, sorry Chiyomi, I can't hang out for too long. I need to get back to school.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Really? So late in the day..?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I'm supposed to help the softball team today, 'cause their coach is sick. I just hope it doesn't run on for too long.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh, that must be fun. I remember you used to play in middle school...

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ...Wait, do you not play anymore?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha, I'm just too busy. I haven't played in a while, I'd be totally out of practice if I tried to start now.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh... I see. Have fun, then.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh my god, look at the time!! We didn't get anything done!!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Seriously, how'd you end up dragging me out here? This was supposed to be a brainstorming session!!!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Sorry... It slipped my mind...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, right, you brought me here on purpose.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: See!! You're literally smiling!!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Don't know what you're talking about…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Chiyomi!!!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: At least the food was good. We should come here again. It's not that far from yours, too.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, true, but maybe when I don't need to pick up the girls like, right now. Sorry, Chiyomi.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Fabric is so expensive...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, no kidding. I wonder if this is the type Koharu uses. I mean, it *feels* similar...

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I think it is. She mentioned coming around here to buy her fabric before.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ...She's gonna be so surprised.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Man, I wish I could help you. Even if it's just the skirt, actually sewing it sounds difficult.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, you've helped me enough by coming along. I know you're busy, so...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Don't say that! I'm never too busy for you.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ugh, I can't believe her... Sorry about Yuuka, Chiyomi. I did not teach her to act like this.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, it's alright. Did something happen..? Last time I visited, she seemed to like me...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: It's nothing you did. She's just been like this lately. Maybe it's growing pains.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ...Are you should it's nothing serious?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I've asked her teachers, and she's seems to be fine there... I mean, maybe there's something she's not telling me, but...

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ah, nevermind. I shouldn't bother you with my problems. At least Akari was happy to see you again!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I guess...
*distant explosions*

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ugh… they're fighting again.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I mean, they seem far away… I think we can still eat lunch over here.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I dunno, MEIKO might spot us. I don't feel like getting roped into one of her monologues.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hey, what if I tried sneaking over to Miya's? I don't have any council meetings today, so no one'll realize I'm gone!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't think you'll make it back in time, so…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, I thought as much… I just hope they finish up before school gets out.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Chiyomi, you're doing ok, right?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Like, classes aren't getting you down? No one's causing you trouble?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Yeah, I'm fine…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: You're sure?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Sanae, seriously.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha, just making sure. I always have the time for you, you know?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Yeah, I know… Thanks, Sanae.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Of course!!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: (I wish she wouldn't look at me like that…)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Chiyomi? Whatcha doing hiding over here?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: O-Oh…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: A Switch? Is that allowed?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Probably not. But it's better than scrolling Tricktrick for all of lunch.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Yeah, that's fair. That's what I do most of the time.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: This looks way better though! Can I join?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ! Of course! I'll load a game we can play together.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: This one? I'll warn you, I'm basically a pro. I've never been beaten at a racing game, it's like, in my genes.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: We'll see. You forgot to press ready, by the way.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh shit. That was on purpose.      Trust.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, I hope you don't mind if I ask, but why are you in the credit system?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I mean, I know you leave after second period, but you never talk about it.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …I have supplementary classes for math. It's an accomodation.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: They said it would be easier to switch to the credit system than try to fit into the normal class schedule, so…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Ohhh, I get it. Honestly, I dunno why people think it's for idols only. The credit system's way better in general.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: More people should be in the credit system, just because they can.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …That would be nice.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: (At least then it might not feel as intimidating…)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, Chiyomi, look at this.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh! Can badges of the new PrePure. Do they have Mitsuki?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Doesn't look like it. They have Count Null though. I'm gonna give it a try.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't get why they leave her out. She's just as important as the main duo. It's obvious she's going to be a late season Cure, anyway…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Um, Kaori, should we go now..?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: No, wait, one more. I'll get her on the next one, I feel it.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: (Oh no… She's been trapped…)

speaker: 8k
dialogue: That was fun. I think we got some progress done.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …But seriously, girl, you have to relax. No one's watching us all the way out here.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't know how you're so nonchalant… You're a public figure. Shouldn't you be worried someone will see you?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Wow, what a scandal. 'Umetsu's daughter caught practicing a dance routine in the middle of the park.' *That's* sure to make the headlines.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Mm… But still…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Don't worry about me. I've got the press in the palm of my hand. If something happens, I'll handle it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Now come on! One more go!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You got the binoculars?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Yep. They're kinda old though, they're my dad's old birding binoculars.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: That's fine, as long as they work. I got the snacks and eye protection.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't think that counts as eye protection.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: We'll be fine~ As if we're even gonna need it. We'll just stay away from any collapsing buildings.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Alright! Operation 'Stormchasing a magical girl battle' is a go! Let's find Miku and MEIKO!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh, Chiyomi, you're having lunch over here? Nice.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Actually, I wanted to ask if I missed anything important. I just got back, and there was some buzz about a quiz…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh. I'm skipping class today…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Seriously? You got a fever or something?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …Sure.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, more power to you. I'll go back out and see if one of our classmates can share notes.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I'll pass it along to you, too. Let's study together later!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hey, that actually worked really well! The soft tennis club just let me walk in like it was nothing.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Told you they don't care. Maybe don't do it too often, though. They might think something's up.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, I thought so. Still, how'd you even find that out?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Simple. It's the Umetsu name. I've got connections in places you could never imagine.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: So long as they know you're with me, they won't lift a finger. You're welcome.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Damn. So Miya's cutthroat like that. Glad I'm on your side, then.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hehe.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: …We're both not supposed to be here.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Speak for yourself. I had a meeting with my manager. Did Kamiyama get out early today?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha… I might be skipping… I don't have any meetings afterschool today, so it's not that big of a deal.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hell yeah. As long as you don't get caught. Let's get to Miya's early and surprise the others.

speaker: 7s
