dialogue: Hey, Kaori, you do acting. Have you heard about this?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Wonderland x Showtime is visiting Pheonix Stage… The theatre troupe? I thought they disbanded.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: They're putting on a reunion show, and this is supposed to be the last stop. I'm definitely going to be there!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I don't know too much about live theatre, but that's good for you. Didn't know you were into theatre like that.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Honestly, not really, I just like these guys.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I've only ever been able to watch their livestreams, but I think it's okay to spurge just this once! I'll take the girls and make it a trip.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Have fun~ While you're there, you should try the rides too. The haunted house one's my favorite.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Isn't it a pain having to wear a disguise everytime you want to go outside? Like, even for a quick run?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Nah, not really. It's not like it takes long for me to put on.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: And besides, it saves me time. If I went out without all this, the people would be all over me~ Love them, but even I need a break from the cameras.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh, I get it. Seeing you like this, I'd never imagine that you'd be an idol. You look so regular.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Hehe. Looks can be deceiving.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: It's impressive how easily you're able to get out of class. I'm only able to get away with it because I'm in the credit system.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, I feel bad sometimes… But it's not like I'm a bad student or anything! Just a bad hall monitor.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh, I see. Doesn't the committee get on your case? Miya's is pretty strict about these things.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Honestly, they're mostly chill. As long as people aren't blowing up the school, I can get away with not writing people up.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Like, literally. Apparently, it was really bad some years ago.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Huh... Maybe we should move the club location to Kamiyama.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: This is so embarrassing… you should've woken me up.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I tried, but you were out like a light. I didn't want to disturb you.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Gh… and we were supposed to plan the next part of the song, too…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Kaori, is it okay if we met up tomorrow? I need to head out soon.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, I don't mind. Life happens.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh, but you should probably check your face before you leave. You might have something on there~

speaker: 7s
dialogue: —! Kaori! Is that why you have that marker?!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hehe. Maybe, maybe not. Ciao.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Koharu~~★ Welcome back~~★

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Ah! You don't look so good. Actually, you look really, really tired!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Thank you for noticing.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: That won't do! Come on, let's go to the stage, I'll show you the dance I've been working on! It'll cheer you right up—

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: AHHH!!! She collapsed!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Miku, please calm down. I just wanted to lie down.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Look, Miku. I'm sure your dance is nice, but I just got off my shift. I'm not up for it right now…

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oh, okay! As long as you're okay~

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Thanks, Miku. But, um, you don't need to lie down with me…

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Nope! Not letting you be on the floor alone.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: After all, even magical girls need their 'lie down and stare at the sky' time!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Sure. Lie down and stare at the sky time is great.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Koharu, I've always wondered, but where do you work?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I'm a waitress… The cafe is usually busy, but it pays, at least.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Ooh, that's so fun!! You get to serve others! I bet you get to meet a lot of people~★ Any regulars you like?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …I think you have the wrong idea. It's not like I get to know the customers personally.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: No? Not even a favorite?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: My favorites are the ones who don't spill their drink all over the floor for me to clean up.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Boo… That's no fun at all…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: This one's my favorite. It took me a while to get, and I still haven't added all the decals, but—

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: WOW!!! It's so detailed!! And you built it all by yourself?!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It's not that impressive… Just some assembly…

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Still!!! That's super-duper cool!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oh, I wish I could have something like that. If I had a giant robot body, I'd be able to defeat MEIKO no problem…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I know what you mean. To have that kind of strength…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Wait, but you already have powers. Would a robot body really help that much?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oh yeah. Teehee★

speaker: 6c
dialogue: What grand looking buildings… That's the academy, right? It looks more like a castle.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Yep! It's super pretty on the inside, too!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: But I like it out here the most. I get lots of space to practice.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Mhm, I see what you mean.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: But, um, I was just wondering. Doesn't that mean you're supposed to be in class..?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Maybe…

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: But *pleaseeeeeeee*, pretty please don't tell the others!!! Koharu will totally tell me off for skipping!!!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: And if I have to sit in a boring classroom all day, my brains will melt! Then how will I defend the school from MEIKO?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …That's a good point. It'll be bad if you can't defend SEKAI.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Wait, really?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: —I mean, yeah! I knew you'd get it, Chiyomi★ Hehe.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Tada! So whatcha think, Miku? It's just a tiny part of the whole song, but I think it's good for us to start with.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: SO FUN!!! I can't believe you came up with that in a day!!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Wait, do it again, do it again! I wanna try copying you!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha, sorry Miku. I just stopped by to ask your opinion… I'm going to be heading back out soon.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Aww…

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Ok! But come again when you can★

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Hmhmhm~ Ladedadeda~

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Watching me do my homework can't be that exciting. Do you even know what this is on?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Nope! Not a clue★

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: I just wanted to keep you company. Um, since you don't usually visit SEKAI on your own.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Wait, really? I feel like I've come by plenty of times.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Yeah, but it's always with Chiyomi or the rest of the club. Never by yourself.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: So I thought, someone should be with you so you don't get lonely!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: D'aww, you're too sweet, Miku.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: (Hehe. She's just like Akari…)

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Grrr!!! I can't stand that annoying MEIKO!!! Who does she think she is!!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Showing up and trying to destroy the academy like that!!! And interrupting my practice!! Hmph!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hmm... Miku, is she also a student here?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Umm… maybe? She seems like the upperclassman-type.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: In that case, I think I have an idea.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You find out who she is when she's untransformed. Follow her, get a sense of her schedule…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Then, when you're sure she's alone, you take her out! Get the jump on her before she can transform! You can even make it look like an accident.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, I know, I'm genius. You're welcome~

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: NO!! No no no!! I'm *not* committing civilian murder!!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: But she's not a—

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: No no no no no!! Not listening!! That kind of underhanded violence… It's just playing dirty!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I'm not seeing how your battles are any different... but okay, your loss.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Kaori!!! Wait up!!!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hm? Oh, Miku! Do you want something?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: You're going to the garden, right? I'll come with you!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hm? But don't you want to practice your routine? I'm just going to explore for a bit.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Yeah, but it's dangerous to go alone! MEIKO could show up at any moment!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Pfft, MEIKO doesn't bother me. The worst she can do is monologue at me. All bark and no bite.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Huh?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Honestly, I don't blame her. She's probably coming to terms with the fact that she'll never match my brillance. It's a tough pill to swallow for many.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Anyway, you don't need to worry about us. Ciao.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Wait, you two are still studying?!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Wow, you two must be model students. I could never★ Teehee.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: What on earth do you mean, 'still studying'? We only started fifteen minutes ago.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: What? Really? It feels like it's been forever…

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: How about we take a break! It's boring sitting here all the time. We can go on a walk, or go to the garden, or…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Absolutely not. You need to have some discipline, Miku. We can't drop everything just because you're bored.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Boo…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …If you'd like, you can sit here with us. I'll give you some of my books.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It's not as exciting, but it'll be nice if we can all hang out together… if you want.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oh, that's fine too! Books are also fun.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Miku, I was thinking… We've only ever seen you transformed. Are you ever untransformed, or are you stuck like that..?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: What? Of course I'm not stuck like this! If I showed up to class in this, everyone would totally have questions!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I still don't get that, considering you don't seem to learn anything…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: But I guess I can understand. Maybe we'll get to see you untransformed one day.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Nope★

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Really?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Hehe, sorry. But it would be totally bad if you guys knew who I really am! It's a liability!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I guess that's how it is in shows, too…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Why does the TV show logic have to apply to *us*?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Thanks for meeting up so quickly, Sanae… I really should've done this beforehand.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hey, don't sweat about it! This won't take that long, right?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No, no, just a couple more minutes. Can you raise your arms?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Got it!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oooh, oooh, me next!!! I wanna get measured!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Miku? What do you need measurements for? Is your dress not fitting you?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: No, my dress always fits me perfectly. It's magic★

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: But I've never had to get measured before, so I was curious… I want to know the numbers!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Okay, I can measure you afterwards. But you'll need to find something less frilly to wear. It'll be a pain working around all those layers.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Um…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Miku, if you want, I could bring over some of my old clothes. Those will probably fit you!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Really?! Okay, thank you!!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Koharu, you sure there's nothing I can help you with? I mean, working on all those clothes can't be easy…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: It's fine. It's not like I'm making them from scratch. I'm mostly making modifications.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Chiyomi's been a great help, too. She's picking up on the basics really quickly.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Really? Maybe I should learn how to sew too, I could help lighten the load.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oh! Me too! I want to help!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Sanae, seriously, it's fine. You're already doing choreography. It's more trouble when everyone tries to work on everything all at once.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: And Miku… you have enough on your plate with MEIKO.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Pleaseeeee? At some point? Just for fun?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: ...Sure. When I find the time.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Where on earth did you get all these keychains?!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Gachapon. Here, take your pick, there's plenty of choices.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Did you clear our the entire machine or something?! Seriously, don't waste your money.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: So cruel, Koharu. I did this out of the kindness of my heart. Now all of us can have any keychain we want.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Oooh, this bear mascot is so cute!! Can I have this one?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Go ahead, Miku. Actually, you can take them all.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: What's anyone going to do with 10 of the same keychain?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: It's good to have backups, just in case the chain breaks. Or she can start a shrine.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: I know! I can wear all of them on my staff at the same time!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: If MEIKO tries to mess with the SEKAI, I'll swing this at her and knock her out like a club!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I doubt that'll do any more damage than attacking her normally…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I don't get you at all, Koharu. How is dancing okay, but an hour of gym isn't?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Those two can't be further apart from each other.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: A dance routine is a performance. You're sending a message to the crowd. There's a level of control in that.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Running around and getting all sweaty and tired for no reason… it's just undignified.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: So it's about how you look… I mean, it's only gym. Everyone's miserable in gym.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Koharu! You can always train in here, if you want! That way, no one'll see you!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, or maybe MEIKO will find you all alone, and you'll end up running for your life.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Not true!! I'll defend her, so she can exercise in peace!!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Thanks, Miku. I'll consider it.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Aww, you two were so small!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Right! I can't believe she used to be taller than me. It feels forever ago.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: S-Sanae…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hehe, sorry Chiyomi. I was showing Miku pictures of the girls, and I got sidetracked.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But aren't we cute in this one!? Remember when we had that field trip to the zoo?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Yeah. You punched our classmate for making fun of the giraffe's face…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I stand by that. He can't choose how he looks like.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I know. It was for a good cause.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Hehe, it's nice that you two are so close.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Geez, you guys had me scared!! I thought Chiyomi got in the middle of a fight or something!!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Sorry… I was just curious about what kind of attacks Miku can do.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: I can do lots!! I need to stay on top of my game if I want to keep MEIKO in check!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …Too bad about the dummy, though.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Yeah… Oh well…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hey, since you're in the mood for battle, how about planning strategy?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Strategy? But that's so boring…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Still, it's good to be prepared! With things like this, it's 5% your physical skill and 95% how you apply it. Like basketball.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It could be fun… I kinda want to know about MEIKO's attacks, too.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: I mean, if you think it'll help! Okay!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: So that's the idea behind this, I think. It's how Koharu explained it to me, anyway.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Ohhhhh…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …You don't get it.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Nope!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: *sigh* That's fine. I heard that explaining your process out loud helps with understanding concepts, so at least I got something out of it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: How about you, Chiyomi? You doing any better?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Maybe we should get Sanae or Koharu in here…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, I got it… Just give me a second.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sure, take your time. I'm gonna double check my work.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, these are nice. I think this is my favorite. All the Miku's in it have such nice designs.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Thanks… I started a new sketchbook right before we found SEKAI, and I got inspired.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It's basically just concept art, though. I don't think I could convert these outfits to actual patterns…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hey, don't worry about it. Those are two totally different skills. Get Koharu to do it or something.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Besides, Miku doesn't seem to mind.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Tada! I tried copying your drawing! How is it?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: That's nice… We should probably get you your own sketchbook, though.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: ? What's going on here? Did something happen?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: …I'm sorry Kaori, but this is an intervention!

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: I-I can't hide your habits anymore! I won't let you ruin your life!!!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I— huh?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Miku told me all about it. What's this about you drinking in the back of the academy?!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Drinking… soda..?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Wait, Miku, don't tell me you believed my spiel about drinking my woes away.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Well— I mean—!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: HA, that's cute. You're so gullible, Miku.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I just didn't want anyone else to find my stash. My mom will get on my case about following my trainer's diet.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Ohhhhhhhhh… okay! Everything's good!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You, Sanae, don't have an excuse.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha, sorry… Miku came to me in hysterics, so I kinda jumped the gun.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Should we take a break now? We've been practicing for a while.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sure, this feels like a good time to stop.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: Really?! But I can keep going!!! I'm not tired at all!!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I mean, yeah. You're magic. You're built different.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: If you want to keep going, you could… but it's nicer to take a break as a group, isn't it?

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: I guess you're right★ Can I have some of your soda?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Go for it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Honestly, this is more my pace. I don't like having to take a bunch of breaks. Makes me feel like I'm not pushing myself enough.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I get it. I wanna get the most out of practice before I have to head out.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But like, I'm already pretty active, and you had a whole training regimen. Can't blame the others for struggling.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Well then. That just means we have to keep pushing them.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Why do I feel like you just want to antagonize Koharu…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshi, what are your grades like?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Okay, I suppose.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Are they ACTUALLY okay, or are you just saying that to be humble?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I suppose they could be better… I don't pay too much attention to them. I was more focused on brass band.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Geez, I thought you could be my tutor, but I think you need the help more than me.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Sorry… I could start studying the material, if you'd like.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You should be studying anyway????

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Nevermind, let's just have a study session one day!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: So like, what's Rion like in class? Is she good at any subjects? Does she talk to anyone else?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Why are you asking me..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Cuz we're friends now! It'll be totally weird if I didn't know these things.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Anyway, what do you mean, why? Aren't you two are like, besties?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Not really… We just sit next to each other, and sometimes we work on assignments together. We didn't really talk until we started having practice.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Then why was she always after YOU in brass band? And how come you were the only one she invited for practice?! That's totally not fair, y'know!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: You ended up joining us anyway… I don't understand what the issue is.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: UGH, nevermind, you wouldn't get it. Can you at least tell me where she might be sitting for lunch??

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh, I know this. She's probably in the library. She's on the committee.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Ok! Thanks, Toshi~ Byebye!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Oh my god. Toshi, Toshi, look at this!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ? Is this your picshare page?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: No, it's some COPYCAT!!! I can't believe her. She totally stole. My. Look.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …I'm not understanding. How did she 'steal your look'?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Just LOOK at this!! She has the SAME SHOES and everything!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh… It just looks like a clown outfit to me. Isn't yours supposed to be a jester..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Sigh… You're too innocent for this world, Toshiki. You have to be on the lookout for people like this!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Or else — BAM! — you'll get knocked down! Crushed underfoot! Like a bug.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …I think this is beyond me.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Really? You want to go shopping with me??

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Like, not a joke? You're not playing with my heart?!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: *Nod*

speaker: 9t
dialogue: My wardrobe is… somewhat dull, compared to yours. I want to try something new.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: TOSHIKI!!! Mark my words, we're going to dress you up so PRETTY!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You're going to be a WHOLE new man! You're gonna be the TALK of SHIBUYA!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Maybe not something so dramatic. I just want to try something different.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: But thank you. I'm looking forward to it.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I messed up just before the bridge…)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I know that this song wasn't made for violin, but it's still frustrating…)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: TOSHI!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ?! Ami? Where did you come from?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Damn, Rion was right, you *are* always practicing. I wanted to see for myself!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Anyway, lemme join you! I got my guitar with me!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I wanted to practice on my own today…)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (…But it could be fun, playing out here together... I should at least give it a try.)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ok. I'll help you set up.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Wait, actually?!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: SCORE!! Just gimme a second!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: So, whatcha think, Toshi? Pretty sweet, right?!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …I don't think we're allowed to touch the harp. The sign says we're supposed to stay behind the tape.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Ok, well, I just did. What are you gonna do, kill me?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: It's not that. It's just, I don't want you to get in trouble…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Oh Toshiki, you sweet summer child… You're too innocent for your own good.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But this isn't an ACTUAL museum, right? If anything, Miku and Luka probably *want* us to play with everything!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: So do you like it or not?!?!?! I practiced super hard on that, y'know!!!!!!!!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …I did enjoy it. Good job, Ami.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: THAT'S what I wanted to hear! Now get ready for an encore!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I hope she's right about not causing trouble…)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Keishiro, your CD. Thank you for letting me borrow it.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh! Oh yeah, right. Totally forgot I lended you that.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …Actually, I thought you forgot about giving it back… It's been… um. Two weeks.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I wanted to make sure I understood the lyrics. I spent some time looking for translations.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Oh. I apologize if I took too long.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Nonono!! It's fine!! Actually, I'm relieved. I was trying to find a way to bring it up.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Also, I didn't really look too hard into the songs' meaning. I just like their music, so… You probably appreciated it more than I did. Ahaha.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: There's nothing wrong with that either. Most people like music for music's sake.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Yeah, I guess you have a point.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Keishiro, does your brother go to Kamiyama as well?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: H-huh? I mean, why?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Just for curiosity's sake. I don't think I've seen him before, but I don't know the third-years too well.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ah… No, he goes to a different high school. An all boys' one.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: He gets out earlier than I do, so he just likes to show up sometimes. To surprise me.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I see… My sister's like that with me as well.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: She's not as extreme as your brother, though. She mostly just checks in during lunch to see if I've eaten.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ha, that's nice of her. That's just how they show they care, I guess.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I suppose so…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I can't say Sanae's anything like him, though…)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Sorry I dragged you out here…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ? I said that I'm fine with coming along. It's not a problem for me.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Yeah, I guess… I just thought you might be busy with practice, so…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Not particularly, no. A few hours away from my violin won't hurt.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Actually, Miku was the one who told me to take a break from practicing. So really, you're doing me a favor.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh! Ok, then that's fine. Here, the shop should be somewhere around here…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (Framing it like that worked… I'll have to keep that in mind for next time.)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Thank you for bringing me here. I'm… very relieved there wasn't any permanent damage.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Of course!! The owner here is really knowledgable. I figured he would know what was going on with your violin.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Is your instrument really only 2 years old, though?! I thought you'd been playing for longer.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Yes. I got it in middle school.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I was told that I was late to start… but I figured if I practiced everyday, I could reach an acceptable level.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Haha, if you're this good, then maybe there's hope for me, too…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Toshiki, do you practice at home at all?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Not often… Usually, I either practice afterschool or on the street. Why?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I'm thinking of ways I can practice more without letting my brothers know.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: The school has a drumkit I can use, but other students might need it… And I can use the drumkit here, but they'll get worried if they can't get a hold of me…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Can you really not tell your family about the band?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: My family still knows about my violin. Will yours not understand..?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …It'll just cause a bunch of trouble.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Really, it's easier this way. I'll figure it out!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: If you say so…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Here.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Huh?! But why?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: For hydration. Take one.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …Ha, so you came prepared. It's fine, I'll just get my own after practice.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I bought this for you, though.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: No, seriously, it's fine! I don't wanna owe you, haha.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: That's not why I bought them...

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Please just take it. I don't want to drink if you're going to be thirsty in front of me.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ah, sorry—

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean. Thank you. For the water.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Of course.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (Finally…)

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You scared the shit out of me. I saw a big block of text and thought something serious happened.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: If you wanted to eat lunch together, you could've said that in less words.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I didn't want to impose on you, and I wanted to make sure I was being clear. I suppose I got carried away…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …I appreciate it. But you're not imposing. If you were, then I'd tell you, honest.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Actually, I was planning to ask if you wanted to grab lunch together, so it all worked out.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Seriously, you don't need to sit all the way over there. We look awkward as hell.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. Ok.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ? You've hardly touched your lunch. You don't like it?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ah, no, it's good. I'm just… a little tired of omelets.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: My sister wants me to eat well, but she ends up packing the same thing everyday… I used to like it, so I think she's just used to making it.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Aww, that's sweet. Better than buying lunch all the time, anyway.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Still, you don't look that happy about it. You should let her know if it's such an issue.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I just don't want to cause her trouble, is all…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously?! How's she gonna know if you don't tell her? At least make your own lunch or something.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ...Ugh. Forget it, how about we swap? Take some fruit.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Thank you. I'll warn you, mine's a little bland.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Thanks for coming with me. I've, um, been looking forward to this book for a while.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Of course. Actually, I was curious about that. I didn't know you spent lunch in the library.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, the library's just cause I'm on the committee. No one really talks to me there, so I end up bored the entire time.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: —Not that I care. If anyone talks to me, I mean. Bunch of nerds and their bookclubs.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I see…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Besides, they don't know what they're missing out on. This series is real fun.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Toshiki, you like death games? Murder mysteries? People getting their head bashed in?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Nevermind. You look freaked out just hearing about it.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: All the way out here? Didn't you have a spot near Main Street?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ah… I used to. Apparently, I need a permit to perform there now.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously? Who told you that?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: A storeowner… I didn't want to be a bother, so I just moved here.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Tch. People play their guitars in the street all the time. Don't see why a violin's any different.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Do you think he got annoyed with me?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: If he did, then he needs to get his ears checked. Seriously, don't think about it. You'll get yourself down.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ok…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Toshiki, you know if we can move the paintings? Or take them down?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I don't think so… I saw a plaque that said not to touch them.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I know we're not *allowed to* But do you think they got laser systems, or cameras?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …You think they're watching us?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I don't want to find out. We could get in trouble.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously? I don't know how you can feel safe in here.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You don't know a single thing about this place, about those Virtual Singers, and you don't even want to find out.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Forget it. I shouldn't rope you into this.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Whatever you're planning, please don't get hurt.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, I won't. I'm not stupid.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …What. You gonna stand there and gawk?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: What, what was—

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Nothing anyone needed to see. Stupid gallery. Stupid SEKAI.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Don't you dare back off now. If you go and tattle to Miku, I'll— I'll—

speaker: 9t
dialogue: No, Rion, I don't care about that!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I need to get bandages— you're bleeding. A lot.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ...Don't bother. This is what I get. Should've worn gloves before I went breaking glass.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Anyway, I should still be able to play—

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (—Ah. He already ran off.)

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (Toshiki, why do you even bother with me…?)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: KEISHI!!! Wanna grab lunch with me?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh! Sorry Ami, I packed a lunch today…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: And I'm waiting for Hiroshi, so we can go over notes together. You should come sit with us when you're done, though!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Oh…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Ahaha, nevermind!!! You have fun! I'm gonna go bother someone else~

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ami—?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (She ran off…)

speaker: 11k
dialogue: (She's fine having lunch when it's the two of us, but when it comes to anyone else… I hope there isn't any bad blood...)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: WOAH. What happened to your bread? It's burnt to a crisp!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, uh. I wanted to try a recipe I saw online. But I left it toast for too long…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You must've had the heat REALLY high for it to get that charred. Are you sure you can eat that?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean, food is food! And anyway, I can't let it go to waste, so—

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Absolutely NOT!!!! That thing's a lost cause. Come on, let's get something from the cafeteria!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Aww…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Come on, the light's gonna turn red!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: We really shouldn't be running…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ami, STOP!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: What'd you do that for?? We could've totally made it!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: No, we wouldn't! Don't run in the road like that!! Wh, what if you got hit?!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Relax, I do it, like, all the time. I haven't gotten run over yet~

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Ok, ok, if you're THAT worried, I won't try it again. It'll suck if I can't play cuz all my bones are broken.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Thank god…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Hehe, you're such a mom. But hurry it up next time!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: That was a nice performance! The guy on guitar looked like he was having fun.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ami, have you ever thought of performing on the street like those guys? I bet you'd get a lot of attention.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Eh… If it was like, with one of you guys, then sure. But DEFINITELY not alone!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Really?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Yeah!! Everyone will think I'm like, some friendless loser!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: If I'm gonna play in public, I wanna SHOW OFF!!! Like, with you guys!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ohhhhh, I get it! Yeah, I'd rather play as a band than all alone.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean, not that I can drag a drumkit out here without getting stared at, haha…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Keishi, don't you have, like, ANY socials outside of LINE?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Um… not really… I guess I'm just not that online, haha…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: That can't be right! Not even a Picshare??

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean… it's a little dumb…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: So you ARE online!! Let me follow you, I'll hype you up!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: It's not really a social though… It's just a blog for reviewing food I try.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: It's not that professional, honestly. I just started doing it because I was bored with my life. Nothing like your account, anyway.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But it's *something*! I should make a blog too, I got a BUNCH of advice to give.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: You should!! I'd definitely read it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: We did it!!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Yay!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Barely…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Hey, this song was YOUR idea. If you wanted something easy, we should've played something we already knew.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ah, sorry, it's not that! It was really fun.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: You got the hang of it so quickly, though… I feel like it takes me forever to find my rhythm.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Well, duh. You only started, like, a month ago.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You better catch up, though! I have some songs I wanna play, and I want us to sound good when we do!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: !! Right!! I'll keep practicing!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: What the hell was that for?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: They had it coming!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: They weren't even doing anything??

speaker: 10a
dialogue: They were STARING. I can't STAND nosy people. Like, mind your own beeswax!!!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You don't need to defend me. You're making it worse for yourself.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Absolutely not! No way am I going to let them look at you like that!! You're my friend!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Where's your ANGER?? Where's your RAGE?!?! Aren't you supposed to be scary??

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Let's just find somewhere else to sit next time.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Don't you want to wear something else?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: And why would I want to do that?? I picked this out especially for today!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Cause it might get hot. We could be in line for a while.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Well, TOO BAD. You're stuck with me, and you're not getting out of photo-taking duty that easy!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: And what're you gonna do if I ditch you anyway?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …I, um, well—

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ...Sorry. That was supposed to be a joke.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Let's just try and get there early. It'll be bad if you overheat before we get any good pictures.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: —! Right! See, I knew you'd get it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: So? Whatcha think??

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …It was fun.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: KNEW IT!!! I knew you'd like this place!!!! When I saw they were having a promotion, I HAD to bring you here!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: And YOU didn't want to come! You would've rather stayed home all day!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I didn't say all that.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: KYAHAHA!! Exactly! My genius knows no bounds!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: So you haven't been playing guitar for long, right?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Nope! Like, a year or so, maybe.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But I know what I'm doing!!! I've gotten good enough to perform, anyway!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I see... You're probably better off than I am, then. I haven't touched my bass in a while…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Don't say that! You have more experience on me in general, so it balances out. Like PEMDAS.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: OH, I know! How about we swap instruments for a day? Then we can both start from scratch!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Hm. Could be fun.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Hmph. Such a dull expression. You're just saying that.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Yayyyyy?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: That's more like it!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: No.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Yes!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You're not paying for me.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I AM, and there's nothing you can do about it!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Fine. Then I won't buy anything.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Then I'll buy it anyway and gift it to you!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Can you just drop it? Why are pushing so hard for this??

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Because we're friends and I want to!!! Now let me pay!!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I'm not going to be in your debt. Just let me pay for my own strings.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Ok. How about we each pay 50/50? Will that work?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Deal!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: (I'll find a way to pay her back without her realizing…)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Blah. I keep messing up this part…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Don't worry about it, that's what practice is for. It's not like anyone's really listening to us out here.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: But are you sure you want to play this song? We can always start with something a bit more easier.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: What, you think I can't do it??

speaker: 12r
dialogue: What? No, that's not what I meant—

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I CAN TOTALLY DO THIS!! One more go!!! I'll prove myself to you!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Okay, okay, I hear you.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Um, Rion?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Hm?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: We're friends, right?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ? Sure we are. You're the one who's always saying that.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You're sure? You, like, *like* me?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I wouldn't be here if I didn't. What, you want me to say I hate your guts?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously, what is this about? Are you trying to get out of practice?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: What? No way!! I just waited forever for you to show up!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: GEEZ, nevermind, you won't get it! Come on, we're already WAY behind schedule!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Coming, coming…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Thanks for explaining all this… You really didn't have to. The notes would've been enough.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Of course!! It's not a problem at all.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Still… I mean, I really didn't mind helping, but couldn't you have asked Toshiki? You're in the same class, after all.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …I guess. I just didn't want to bother him.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: We always end up working together in class, and I was always after him in brass band. If I keep this up, he might get tired of me.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ahaha, I know what you mean… I don't think Toshiki's that kinda guy, though.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously? They took your textbook?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean. I let them borrow it, and they lost it somewhere…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Fuck that. They totally did it on purpose.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: What else was I supposed to do? They already apologized…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Apologies don't cut it. They knew you wouldn't make a scene. You'd let them get away with it.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Look, Keishiro, you tell them to either pay up or find it, or I'll do it for you.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Rion…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Whether or not it was on purpose, it's the least they can do.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …Yeah, you're right… I'll talk to them.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: This advertisement…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Rion, um, sorry if this is weird, but do you know this lady? She has your last name, so I thought…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Huh. I didn't realize the concert was this soon. So that's what Mom was preparing for.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh? She's your mom?!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: That's so cool! I didn't know she was a conductor. No wonder you're in brass band, you must have a bunch of experience.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: No, that doesn't have anything to do with it. I got forced into helping out. It's basically community service.
