speaker: 1m
dialogue: No, it wasn't like that! We were just curious!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I mean, it's weird, isn't it? A single livehouse can't be this big. At some point, it has to end.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Maybe if this was the real world. It's probably, like, backrooms logic.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Maybe that's why Miku's so grumpy all the time. She never goes outside.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: In that case, maybe we should try to get her to visit us more often.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Thanks for helping out. Usually I have to make multiple trips for these, so it's appreciated.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: No prob! Looking at all those speakers was really fun ★

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ugh… I didn't think these would be so bulky, though… they looked tiny in comparision to the others.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Wedge monitors. I've been putting off upgrading them. Hopefully, these don't cause as many problems for me.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Oh, light's green. Keep up, you two.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hiroshi, race ya to the other side!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: No way in hell. I'm not paying for this if it breaks.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Hmm…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hi~ro~shi! We're back!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: What were you looking at? Were you thinking of buying an instrument?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ah, no… They have a book on sound design here.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I already have a digital copy, but I was thinking if I should buy a physical version too…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: You should go for it! That way, you can put sticky notes and annotations on it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hm. Do you think you'll read it again if you had a copy?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Probably not... It helped me in the past, so I just thought it would be nice.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Oh, so it's nostalgic for you. Personally, I wouldn't spend more money on something I already have.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I'll buy it for you! Problem solved.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: That's not… It's fine, I'll sleep on it and come back tomorrow.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Sorry Raika, we took a wrong turn…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: And we found a bunch of super cool people!! Like, super hardcore street singer guys!!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hardcore street singer guys…' Oh! Do you mean Vivid Street?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Uh, I think that's right. It was. vivid.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I always like hosting musicians from there, I can trust that they take their music seriously. So, how was it?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Well, Mayuko tried to cheer some street singers on, and we ended up getting challenged? For something…?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: And then Hiroshi dragged me away before I could join!! I wanted to do karaoke.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: They don't just do karaoke in Vivid Street. They were probably in a battle.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: A battle..? Wait, we're not in trouble for interrupting, right?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're fine. They probably realized you were newcomers, and wanted to scare you off.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I wasn't scared. Let's go back, I'll show them what I can do!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, let's go back and get our asses handed to us. Great way to spend our afternoon.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Come on, let's just go find Yurina.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hey hey, Raika, you think you can VJ for us outside of VISR?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: We haven't finished planning any sets… We're not getting any calls outside of VISR yet.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah, but it's good to ask in advance, right?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'd be happy to help with visuals while you're performing in VISR, but I can't promise anything outside of that.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …Honestly, Mayuko, I'm an amateur. It's just not something I'm focused on when I have to manage the venue.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: That makes sense. It's a lot of work for what's basically a side-gig.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Mhm. I figured I could help bands achieve their vision for a performance, so I learned what I could. But you're better off finding someone else.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Aww... but I wanted Raika…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: We'll think about it later, okay?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Okay, back. Sorry for ditching like that.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: What was going on with that girl? Was she lost?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, she got separated from her group, and her phone was dead. Good thing they weren't far.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Still, you should be careful about lending your phone out like that. She could've snatched it and ran.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Raika, that's so cold. Besides, it's a good opportunity!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Opportunity for what?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: To advertise! You said that we should be putting ourselves out there, right? You should've invited her to our set.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You both need to get your priorities straight.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Look, I'm sorry…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Not cool, Yurina. I was waiting forever for you to show up!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I have to prepare the stage for tonight. I can't let you two use VISR right now.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Ah… Sorry. Honestly. Something came up, and I had to meet with someone to clear things up…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hmph.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Just figure it out, you two. If you're going to use VISR, I need to know in advance.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Mayuko, is Saturday good? Same time?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Okay! If Raika's okay with it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: That should be fine. I'll mark it down.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yayyyyy~ Practice is on again~ Thank you Yurina~

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Why are you thanking me? I was the one who — Actually, nevermind.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina, Raika, look! They were having a sale! Take one!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Oh, cheese puffs. Thanks, Mayuko.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Yurina, seriously? Mayuko went out of her way to buy some for you. Just take them.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, no, sorry Mayuko. I'll pass. I can't stand this brand.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Huh? You sure?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Positive. They're like, way too sweet.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: ? Did I get a bad batch?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Don't take it to heart, Mayuko. Yurina has a… unique taste in snacks.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You really want to start this again? I'm literally normal. It's the rest of you who are crazy.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: It's not even sweet. It's a normal flavor. What's not normal is expecting cheese to be *savoury*.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Oh my god. I'm not taking this from you. You take everything but your coffee obnoxiously sweet.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Uh… It's fine, you two, really! I'll just give the extra bag to Hiroshi.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: That was fun~ I even got something for Hiroshi~

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Raika, you should've let me buy you something! You're always dressed so boring.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I just don't see a point in buying anything fancy, is all. I'm working behind the scenes, so no one's going to see me.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Well, yeah, but what about for when you go out?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I don't do that.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hehe. I don't think this kind of fashion is her style, anyway. She's more about sweaters and all that cozy stuff.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Bet! Raika, I'll find you something you like.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Damn it… Mayuko, seriously, save your money.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Rai~ka! Found you!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Mayuko, how did you—

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Miku likes to hide here and watch us practice, so I thought I'd say hi! Didn't think you'd be here, though.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Please ignore me. I'm just here to make sure nothing bad happens. I don't trust this place not to fall apart on us.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: You sure? I can let Yurina know if you need something.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Ghh, don't tell her I'm here. She'll make a big deal of it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You know what, nevermind. I'll take my leave. Have fun practicing, Mayuko.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Mayuko, did something happen? You've been here for a while.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Oh… it's nothing! Let's just get back to practice!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You know, you don't need to be so tense. We're not gonna bite.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …Sorry. It's just. Weird.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Eating lunch is weird?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Seeing you two outside of VISR. I forgot you're just a year older than me.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Raika, you hear that? He's calling you old.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Not like that—!

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Yurina, be nice. And we're in the same grade, that makes you old, too.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Thank god for that. I can't wait to be 18. Actual freedom.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Adulthood isn't that simple, you know.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ugh… forget I brought this up. I don't want to think about all that.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah no, I used to annoy the hell out of Raika when we were in middle school.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Like, we were in the same class, so I thought I'd get to know her by hanging out at VISR...

speaker: 3y
dialogue: But looking back, I was coming on way too hard.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're being too hard on yourself. I figured you were trying to be friendly, anyway, so I didn't mind.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Really? I thought you gave me all those chores so I'd buzz off.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'm not that cruel.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Honestly, that sounds familiar…

speaker: 2h
dialogue: When we first met, Mayuko and I exchanged LINEs, and not even a day after, she was trying to buy us tickets to go to some livehouse. I barely got to recover from the day before.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Aww, see, that's some good fun! Raika's idea of fun is making me do unpaid labor.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Consider it payback for all the time you've broken my locks.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (…I think I prefer Mayuko to whatever this is.)

speaker: 3y
dialogue: You got what you needed, Hiroshi?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Mhm, thanks for waiting.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Not sure why you two wanted to wait outside the store, though. You sure you don't want to look around?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Ahaha, I'm good. I don't think they'd be too happy to see me.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ..? What, did you rob them or something?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: No, but...

speaker: 2h
dialogue: ...But what? What happened?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Yurina, let it go. It was a misunderstanding.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I mean, it doesn't matter now. People talk. They don't like me.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You aren't changing anyone's minds with an attitude like that…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Nevermind, we'll talk later. Sorry for the trouble, Hiroshi.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Uh… yeah, no problem.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: (Seriously, what kind of history do these guys have…)

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hiroshi, is that your synthesizer?

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Ooh, that's a pretty instrument you got. Looks kinda old, though.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: It's not mine. I found it in one of the closets here.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Here, take a look. I don't know how SEKAI works, but if I'm right, this is an insane pull.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Really?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Really!!! I can't believe Miku would just shove this in the back. They stopped making polysynths like this years ago!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …I'm kinda too scared to touch it.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Well, this is a first. I've never seen you this excited. Now I wanna hear its sound myself.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I'm curious as well. Can we help you set it up?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh, uh, actually… that would be nice. Thanks, you two.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Kaori's out today…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: That's a shame. I needed to ask about adjusting her outfit.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Really? I thought everything was finalized.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Chiyomi was thinking about removing the line of spikes under the arms here. It might be uncomfortable for her if we're going with hard plastic.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh, I see. In the show it looks cool, but if you actually keep your arms at your side, it'll stab you.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It's either that, or we make it out of something softer. I'm just worried about it wearing down.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: It shouldn't really matter, right? It's not like she's wearing it regularly, or running marathons in it.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Still, I'm leaving it up to her. Let's get in the classroom before a teacher sees us.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I can't believe you two.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Sorry!! I didn't realize you got lost in the crowd!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I can't be *that* easy to lose.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I mean… you are pretty short…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Sorry…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: It's fine... Maybe I should invest in some heels.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Those are such a pain to walk in, though. You're fine as is, Koharu.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I know I'm fine as is. But I need to survive in public somehow.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Come on, let's just cross before the light turns red.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: That was really fun, actually. I had no idea they held markets here. Thanks for bringing me along.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Of course! There's usually something going on here, it's great if you want something to do.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Mhm. And the park's big enough that you can avoid the crowds if you want. There's some nice quiet spots if you search for it.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Why you would come all the way out here to wallow is what I don't get.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: See! They even have an obstacle course! You can't feel sad doing an obstacle course.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ergh…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Well, maybe you could.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Seriously, where on earth is she?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Chiyomi, you sure Kaori's in SEKAI?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I mean, she told me she was going to be in here, and her backpack's still at the stage….

speaker: 5k
dialogue: We've searched all over the grounds. Don't tell me she went inside the academy. She has no reason to wander that far.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: That, or she's gotten in trouble with MEIKO…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I don't think that's the case. Miku would be kicking up a storm if that happened.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Let's just find a way inside. Maybe Miku'll know what's going on with her.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …How long is Sanae gonna stay hidden? It's not like they know she's here.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: She told me she waits 5 minutes afterwards to be safe. Sometimes she moves around if she thinks the teachers' already been somewhere.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: She's actually insane. She's lucky there isn't a warrant on her.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Maybe we should help her out. If we create a distraction, she can sneak in with all the noise.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You just want to cause trouble.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Koharu, since you're such a good student, why don't you help me out? You can be the bait.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You just want to get *me* in trouble!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I can be the bait. I'd be such good bait.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Oh, nevermind, Sanae's back. Maybe next time, Chiyomi.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Should we just go inside without her?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, too risky… If Sanae gets caught, it's easier to say she was with one of us.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh yeah, I remember. When we first met, I had to bail her out cuz she almost got caught trying to sneak in.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, she basically owes me her life~

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Don't be weird. Why would you help a stranger sneak into the school? What if she was dangerous?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I was bored, and it looked like something interesting was happening. And it was, wasn't it? Everything's gotten so exciting since we found SEKAI.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It has! I mean, even without the SEKAI…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I'm happy we get to hang out like this.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I guess I can't be mad about that.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: This CD... Kaori, is this your group?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: ?! Why are they still selling those? This is ancient.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I mean, I know the media can't get enough of me, but that's ridiculous.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Maybe they're trying to get rid of deadstock?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: In that case, I think I'll buy it. I want to see how great your singing was 3 years ago.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sure, go for it.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …You don't care?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: What, you think I'm embarrassed? I'm a trained professional, Koharu. It's not the same as your karoake sessions as a kid.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: —! I'll have you know, I did not have those.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Hehe. Koharu, when you're done, let me borrow it. I'd also like to listen.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Thanks for coming along. I almost forgot to pick up the birdfeed before I went home.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I hope you had fun.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Of course! I loved the kittens. I wish I could've taken them all home…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You can't become a crazy cat lady yet, Koharu. You're only 16. At least wait a decade or two.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ha ha ha. You liked them too. The little grey one loved you.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Hehe, that's nice… A cat sounds nice, but I don't know if it'll work with my mom's budgies.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh, right. That could go really bad.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: But budgies are cute, too. Do they know any tricks?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oooh, you should teach them recall. Imagine how cool you'd look walking around the city with a bird on your shoulder.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't think my mom would let me risk that…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sad. Well, you can get a pigeon off the street and try it on that.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Don't go around grabbing random birds. That's just unsanitary.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: — Chiyomi, don't tell me you're considering it…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: What on earth…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Psst, Koharu, get out of the way!!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: ??? What are you two doing in the hedges?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Trying to lure in MEIKO.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Are you serious? A box trap? She's a Virtual Singer, not a cat.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: And what is this bait? Did you uproot a bunch of her flowers from the garden?! She's going to kill you.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, we got them from outside… But she doesn't need to know that.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Now get in here. Or do you want her to catch you next to her precious flowers?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: All these branches are going to ruin my skirt.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh my god, you'll live.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: How crazy would it be if we tried to have our club meeting on the roof?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Too crazy. You're already pushing it with sneaking into the classroom.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, sorry Sanae, we'd probably get caught.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I think there's some school idols who practice up there afterschool, so we couldn't go even if we wanted to.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh, right. MORE MORE JUMP! used to use this school's rooftop. And they've made it super big, so it must be holy ground for you guys.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: That's about right. It must be nice for them, knowing they inspired so many people…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: *Sigh* I wish they'd be inspired somewhere else. We can't really practice our routine in the classroom. Unless we move the desks around more?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: We'd have to push the desks out of the classroom to have enough room. Just be grateful for the space we have.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Are you sure you'll be able to pick up your sisters in time? It's getting late, and we walked most of the way here…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Sure I will! I'll just run the rest of the way back, no big deal.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Besides! I can't let you two walk home alone either. I should at least go with you halfway.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Sure you can. You don't need to worry about us, we're not getting snatched off the street.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Well, Koharu won't be. But I haven't been kidnapped since I was 13, so you don't need to worry~

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Wait— really?!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Kaori's messing around. She's not that important to get kidnapped.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Anyway, as long as you're not making them wait for long, I don't mind. Maybe we should use the underground passage next time.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: (What's Koharu doing in that alleyway..?)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: O'Malley? Are you here..?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Kittyyyyy? Pspspspspsps?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Meow~

speaker: 5k
dialogue: —GAH!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: KAORI!!!!!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: HA, you should see yourself right now. You're beet-red.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Shut up!!!!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Kaori, stop that!! Koharu was just— uh, actually, Koharu, what were you doing?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ugh… I was looking for a cat.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: He's this big, ginger tom, and he's usually around this alley. I named him O'Malley.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh, like that one cat movie. Now I want to see this O'Malley in the flesh.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Are you sure he's a stray? If he's not here, he might've gone back home to his family.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I hope not… I would've liked to adopt him one day…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You hope that he's homeless? That's cold.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: —I'm kidding, I'm kidding! I don't see any gingers around, anyway. Let's get out of this place.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: What kind of shopping trip is this? We've barely bought anything. You've just been dragging us from store to store.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Because this isn't a shopping trip. We're buying clothes to repurpose, and we need to be smart about it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You're being cheap about it. That dress would've been perfect with some adjustments. I have the allowance.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: As if I'm going to let you spend that much. I could make something as simple as that.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Maybe at the cost of your *sanity*.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Where's Sanae? Let's ask her what she thinks—

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ok, I'm back!! Look what I got!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …These are friendship charms.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Super cute, right? Here, Koharu, the apple is yours. And Kaori, you get the pony. I got the butterfly for Chiyomi, and the sunflower's mine!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Hell yeah, this is more like it. Thanks, I'm gonna keep it on my backpack.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Wait, Koharu, did you want a different one?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No, no, these are cute. Thanks, Sanae.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Y'know, it's always super sunny and nice in here. I wonder if it ever rains?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: The outdoor stage doesn't have a roof or anything, so it would suck if we couldn't practice in here.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I mean, there's always the academy itself. We could just go in there.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, but that feels wrong. Most of the time we're out here. I dunno how you sneak in there so often.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I think we have bigger concerns than the weather.

speaker: 14mgm
dialogue: *BOOM*

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Good point.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, let's just meet up at the park. I'll let Chiyomi know.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Koharu *skipped school???*

speaker: 7s
dialogue: No way. Are you sure?? Maybe she's sick? Or she had an emergency?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Oh, I got it. She got kidnapped, and now she's being held for ransom. Did you check for any coded messages?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, I'm sure. I asked one of her classmates. Apparently she skips gym a lot, and they had a physical exam today.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Huh. And she gets on *my* case for leaving early all the time.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: At least she's not kidnapped. I knew she hated gym, but that's extreme. You know if she's still coming?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: No, sorry… She didn't reply to my texts, so…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: That's fine. I just hope she's not in trouble…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: So you two known each other for a while, huh…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yep! Since primary school. We were in the same class, so it just kinda happened.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Aw, that's sweet. I didn't talk much to people in primary school, I think most of my friends are from junior high.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Honestly, me neither… but we saw each other a lot outside of school, so that helped.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: What about your work? Are you friends with the rest of your group?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Eh.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Really?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I'm friendly enough. Hard to make actual friends when you effortlessly outshine everyone, though. You know how it is.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Not really… But I mean, I don't know what the industry's like, so…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh wow, they have a lot of PrePure stuff here… I don't recognize half of it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Probably from the previous seasons. It's been going on since before any of us were born, so they got lots to choose from.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Man, now I have no idea what to get for the girls. Chiyomi, what do you think?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I don't know… Can't you just ask them..?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But then it won't be a surprise!! Okay, just tell me what you *would* want if I was buying you something.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: PG RZ-78 2.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: …Huh? What season is that from?!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: She's talking about model kits, Sanae. I don't think these are her style, anyway.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Fair enough. I'll just ask the girls when I pick them up.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Sorry…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: No, it's nothing to apologize for!!! We'll get there, we just gotta keep working at it!!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: ...I'm just bad at this.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: No need to be a downer about it. Everyone mixes up their left and right sometimes.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Y'know, one of my groupmates would do something… Whenever she was practicing, she'd paint her nails on one hand a certain color, so she didn't have to think too hard about which direction was which.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: And mirrors confused her, so she'd film herself from the back. She said it helped her map her movements better.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You think that'll help?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I'll try it. I can't say how well it'll go, though…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Give it a shot! We'll just try again tomorrow.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Here you go, Toshi! Gift for you~!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ?… What is this for?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Ever since we started hanging out, the disciplinary committee's been leaving me alone about my uniform! I owe you one~

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Wait, Toshiki has connections?! That's so cool!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Yeah!! With this one upperclassman, anyway. She's on the student council too, so she's like, SUPER high rank.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: H… huh? I'm not sure what you mean…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. Do you mean Sanae?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You don't know who I'm talking about? Isn't she, like, your sister??

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I know she has a lot of work afterschool, but I'm not aware of the specifics…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Geez. You're SERIOUSLY out of the loop. At least Keishi's new and has an excuse.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Wait, I don't want to be out of the loop! Who else is on the council? Anyone I should know?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: See, THAT'S the attitude you gotta have if you wanna to survive! Pay attention, we're having a lesson on the Kamiyama social hierarchy!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (You make it sound as if we're in some kind of high school drama…)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Keishi, you ever thought of reviewing the cafeteria food on your blog?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Um, I've considered it… But, I mean, it's just school food. I can't really post about that.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Boo. They could use your opinions. They're SUPER inconsistant. It's like they flip a coin each morning to decide whether or not to spice the curry.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Really? I hate it when its spicy. It's feels like they're trying to cover up the lack of flavor.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I think it tastes fine…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshi, you eat omelets everyday. You just don't have the taste bud capacity to know this stuff.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: B-but it's not like we can't change that! It's just about expanding your palette. We should all go out and eat somewhere!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Toshiki, do you have any preferences?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Not that I can think of… I'm open to anything you have to offer.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: OOOH, actually, I know the PERFECT place!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshi, how about some yakiniku? I know a place that'll CHANGE you as a PERSON!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …Uh, or maybe something less intense? He's looking kinda scared.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …No, that's alright. If Ami says it's good, then I'm looking forward to it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: YIPPEE!! I'll tell Rion when she gets back, and we'll make it a date!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ami, at least tell us before you run off…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Sorry!!! But there was these really cute phone accessories at that shop!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Do you have any room left on your case..? It's already so crowded.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: OBVIOUSLY, I wasn't gonna stick it on this one. It doesn't even match with the aesthetic! Keep up, Keishi.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: — Wait, where's Toshiki?!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh no…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshi!!!! Stop running away!!!!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. When did you two walk off..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Don't pin this on me!! You're the one who stayed behind!!!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Maybe we should all just hold hands and walk…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Why are we doing this..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Because Miku's being cryptic about how far SEKAI goes, and I. want. answers!!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Keishi, tie this end to the statue's base.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: On it!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: And this end of the rope will be ours! So everyone just stay behind me!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: But… Miku said something could find us, if we go too far…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: W-wait, hold on, she said that?!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshi, she was totally messing with us. She was probably talking about Luka, or something.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: And anyway!!! If we pause Untitled, we should be fine. So no chickening out!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Um… okay! If you say so.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: THAT'S what I wanna hear! Now, ONWARDS!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (The knot came undone…)

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (I'll just stay here and hold onto this end.)

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Come on!!! ONE of us has to be smart enough to get this. It's supposed to be, like, a 33% chance.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Where are you getting this number from?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: There's three of us. 33%, 66%, 99%. Keishi's not here, so he can be the 1%.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Oh. Actually, Keishiro's good about studying. He was teaching me about derivatives the other day cuz I missed the lesson.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Go ask with him if you're confused on this problem. I'm no good at tutoring people.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But you tutored Toshi all the time. Are you SURE none of that transfers over?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: It was only for violin… and we didn't end up doing any proper practice…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Boo. How am I supposed to keep honor roll like this?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ???? You're on honor roll??

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Ami, that makes *you* the smart one. If anything, you should be tutoring *us.*

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Ok, fine, you caught me…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But I REALLY don't understand this!!!!! I need ALL HANDS ON DECK here, people!!!!!!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I can't say I'll be much help… But I'll try my hand at it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I don't get why you keep showing up for brass band. None of us go there anymore.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ? Do you think the director cares if my friends aren't in the program anymore? I still have to show up and help. Kinda the entire point.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Seriously? What, for the whole year?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: *Yes.* Can we drop it?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Maybe I should ask to rejoin. If it keeps you company…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: God, no, you don't need to do that. Besides, the director won't let you.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Yeah, he'll totally get on our case about being wishy-washy.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: *sigh* How I miss the good old days of one month ago…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Are you sure you don't just miss causing trouble..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshi!!!! So mean!!!!!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Anyway, I don't miss it THAT much. What we have is, like, WAY better~

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Yeah. I like this too.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Should I cut my hair?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Huh?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Where's this coming from? I mean, if you want to—

speaker: 10a
dialogue: NO!!!! NO NO NO NOOOOO!!! Don't! do! it!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Ami, calm down. It's his hair, he can do what he wants with it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I know, but that takes FOREVER to grow!! And he can style it in so many ways!! You can't do that if you buzz it all off!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I wasn't planning on buzzing it…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …I don't think I want to cut it, anyway. I just thought I should, now that I'm in high school.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Ok well, don't do anything you don't want to do.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Ami's right, you can always just style it some other way.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Toshiki, when you're ready, come to me! I'll do you WAY better than any old hairdresser.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ok. Thank you.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ami, have you seen Rion?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: No? Didn't you see her in class?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: She showed up to school, but then left around English… I'm going to go look for her.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You sure she isn't like, sick or something? Maybe she went home early?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Yeah, probably not.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Lemme come with you, though! I don't wanna have lunch outside, anyway.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Geez. Can't even skip in peace.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: RION!!!! You need to tell us BEFORE you disappear like that!!! You know how LAME I look sitting alone at lunch.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, yeah. Sorry. I just didn't want to deal with this teacher.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You guys gonna have lunch here?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: If you don't mind. I also have the notes from class, if you want them.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You really don't have to… I was gonna come back after lunch.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Thanks, though. Let's sit down somewhere.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …The painting in this gallery…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: What about it?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. It's nothing.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I thought that it looked different the other day… But I must be imagining things.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: PSST, Rion, follow me!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Should we tell him?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Obviously? What, are you saying we don't?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I mean!!! What if he spills?? Then that's Miku's experiment RUINED!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously, he's not a child, he knows how to keep his mouth shut. Have some faith.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ...Excuse me. I can hear you two.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Oh.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: What is this about an experiment?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Well, since you figured it out, I guess we can tell ya~ So basically…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Too loud in there.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Too *noisy* in there.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Sorryyyy… I thought it would be a nice change of pace to eat in the music room…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: It isn't your fault. It was nice of you to introduce us to your friends.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Of course! I'm glad you guys got to meet them.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Rion, you should've stuck around longer.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: No thanks. I already know what they think of me.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Come on… They're nice…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: It's just the truth.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Whatever, I'm gonna go find Ami. Have fun, you two.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: That was nice. I had no idea there was a pastry place down there. You'd think they'd try to stand out a bit more.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Me neither… Though, I don't wander too far from this street anyway…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Aw man, you two are missing out! There's some great food spots around here.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Thanks for taking us. Though, what was with the photos? You got a secret Picshare or something?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh no, that was for my blog! I've written about this place before, but it was so long ago, so I think I'll do a followup piece.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. So that's why you were interrogating us.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I— Interrogating?!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Uh, yeah? You were asking us a million questions about the interior and the flavor and all that. I thought you were just worried we wouldn't like it.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Eek… I'm sorry… I thought I was being discrete…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I don't mind. It just means you take your blog seriously. I'd like to hear more of your recommendations.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh!! Ok then, if you really don't mind!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, what fancy clothes…!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: These look like the type that Ami wears.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Huh, you're right. They got a nice aesthetic going on here. Maybe this is where she gets her coords.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ahaha… I was just thinking about what we'd wear on stage. Some bands have matching outfits, so I thought…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ahh, I dunno if I can pull this off, though…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, same here. I'd just look stupid.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I think it could be fun.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Really? Didn't think you were that bold. I don't think I'd seen you outside of sweater vests.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Well, I like them… But it's good to try something new, isn't it?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean..! If Toshiki's willing to try it, maybe we should too?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: We should ask Ami later! She might have an idea on how to get started.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, no, if you don't want your brothers to find out at all, that isn't gonna work. Even an electric drumkit's gonna make noise.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Aww… I mean, I thought so, but I was still hoping…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I know how you feel. I had gotten an electric violin because I was told I could practice without disturbing others.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: But it ended up being audible, anyway. So now, I just play outside.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Really? Man… At least your violin's portable!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: That's not the only problem that violin gave you.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I mean, it doesn't matter now. But if you were still in brass band, you'd be shooting yourself in the foot, using that for practice.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …It's in the past. It works for what we have now, doesn't it?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, true. Ami really is a lifesaver.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Anyway, Keishiro, you can just practice in here. It's probably better for you, anyway.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Yeah, good point… Thanks anyway.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Are you two trying to embarrass yourselves on purpose??

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Ok, in OUR defense, I didn't know it was possible to get kicked out of the library. How were we supposed to know that?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: That's even *worse????* How do you even knock down an entire shelf like that?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Sorry… We thought if we helped you put back the books, you'd get out faster…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: But the stepladder thing wasn't my fault! I— I think one of the steps was broken…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Wait, seriously? That's what happened?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: That's an actual safety hazard. Why didn't you tell them that? They would've understood if that was the story.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Sorry… I didn't want to cause trouble…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I WAS trying to tell them that!!! Maybe they should've LISTENED instead of bitching about my VOLUME!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Ugh… Keishiro, you're okay, right?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Yeah, I'm fine…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: That's good. Let's go back and tell them about the ladder.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Aren't we kicked out, though?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: We still need to make sure no one else gets hurt. Come on. And keep it down this time.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You're real excited to get this album.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Really? Is it obvious..?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You've been smiling to yourself this entire time. Yeah, it's obvious.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ahaha… I've been saving up for this since they announced it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Really?? Can you understand the lyrics? Are you, like, secretly super fluent in English?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Not really… but, I mean, someone'll come out with a translation! I can wait.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: And anyway, they're always super creative with their composition. Language doesn't matter with production like this…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Pssh, we have to practice English anyway, you're probably just gonna translate it yourself.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: In that case, lemme borrow my dad's CDs. I'll put you on some REAL niche overseas music.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, okay!!! Sounds fun!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Seriously, Ami, it's not a competition.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I mean, duh. I'm just making sure he actually means all that stuff.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh!! He's adorable!! His ears are so floppy.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: You have so many pictures of him, too. What did you say his name was?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Bonbon!!! Isn't he the cutest?!?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I wish you guys could actually meet him. He's just also so GRUMPY!!! I can't take him anywhere.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Grumpy..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: YEAH!! He gets so mean with other bunnies. When I take him outside in his carrier, he just thumps his foot all the time.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: You shouldn't bring him outside, anyway. Rabbits are delicate.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Pssh. He's not delicate at all. He bites my fingers if I don't give him his breakfast in time.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Finger biting or not, he's still a prey animal.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: In that case… Maybe you can bring him to SEKAI? It's usually quiet there.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: OOOH, great idea!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: N-no way…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: ?! Wait, Rion, are you *scared* of rabbits?!
The hell?? Where'd you get that idea from??

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I'm just saying, SEKAI stressed *me* out. A rabbit'll have no idea what's going on. It's just being considerate.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Don't look at me like that.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Awww, Rion has, like, a super secret soft side!! So cute!!!!!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Don't worry, Rion, I'll help you get over your fear~ If Bonbon cooperates.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: *sigh*… Fine, whatever.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: How do you have *this many* vinyls?? Aren't these expensive? Is this some new hobby of yours?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: No way! Shopping for coords is EXPENSIVE! I'd be, like, completely broke!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Anyway, these aren't mine, they're my mom's!!! I wanted to show them off, since we have a record player now!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Really? Wow! She must've been a big fan of this artist… I can see where it's worn…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: DON'T!!! TOUCH!!!!!! It's FRAGILE!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Sorry!!!! Sorry, here, take it back…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I'll do the honors~!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …….AHHHHH, I'm scared!! What if this is like, a trap record player?? Can SEKAI do that???

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Oh my god. I'll do it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Rion—!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Well, it wasn't a trap! Ok Keishi, you can pick the next one~

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Oh, I see her! She's coming this way.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hi~! Ok, I'm ready, let's go!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: What the hell happened? You weren't replying to my messages either. Raika was about to have an fit.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Aha, sorry… Some guy bumped into me and I lost my hat in the crowd. So I was looking for it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: At least send a message next time…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Hold on, is that the same cap you're wearing right now? Don't wear that, it's probably been stepped on.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Seriously, who do you take me for? I'm not gonna wear a hat that got trampled!!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Obviously, this is my backup★

speaker: 4r
dialogue: …Huh.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, I figured. She has like, 5 of the same hat.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, that's good. It means she has a brand. Everyone will know that you're a cool guy.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Exactly! Finally, someone gets it~!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Anyway, let's go already! We have to set up early for today.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: How on earth are you eating that? It's 50% chocolate sauce and toppings.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: The same way you're eating your parfait right now.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah, but there's so *much.* You won't be able to enjoy the ice cream like that.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I know, how about you give me some of your chocolate pieces? It'll lighten the load.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Geez… if you're still hungry, just take some of mine. All that sugar can't taste good, anyway.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Really? Thanks Hiro~

speaker: 4r
dialogue: How am I the weird one here?? Yurina's literally eating hers with french fries.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: *munch*

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Ok, but that's like, the least weird thing Yurina's done.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Excuse you, dipping fries in ice cream is a time-honored American tradition. I'm honoring my roots. And it's good.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Wait, really? In that case, I'm taking a fry, I wanna try it.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're gonna have a taste of everyone's order by the time we're done…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: My hands hurt…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Well, yeah. You played the same song nonstop for an hour.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I wanted to get a perfect score! I was just warming up, I could've totally gotten on the scoreboard if I wanted.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, I believe you. Maybe choose an easier song next time, though.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Still, it's cool that they have these machines. I've only ever played the console version. It's a totally different feel.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: I know, right? I just wish it had some newer Miku songs. These songs are kinda old.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Kinda hard to do that when it's discontinued.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Hiroshi! Where did you and Raika go, anyway? It was your turn next.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: You were taking too long. We went to the claw machines.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Aw, that's a cute bunny plush. Only one?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: …I spent all my credits. Raika ended up helping me, anyway.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: All I did was tell an employee to reposition it. It's the least they could do after you spent as much as you did.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, but still… Thanks, Raika.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Mayuko, can you at least *try* to be professional online?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: What? I'm totally professional! Did I forget to switch accounts or something?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I'm talking about your main. Even if it's not the cyberTHESIS account, everyone's gonna associate you with it.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: I've already seen posts about you going on a frenzy online.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: A frenzy?? What was Mayuko posting?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Just quoting the announcement for age of audio's new single. Like. 20 times.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Blah, you're such a stick in the mud.  I'm just hyping them up!

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yurina, you do that, right? If your friend posted a new song, you'd go and promote it to your followers too!

speaker: 3y
dialogue: I mean… I'm not close with other DJs like that, so…

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Raika?

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Bands usually do their own advertising. I'll post schedules on the website, but that's it.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: See? Yurina and Raika are normal. Just get a priv or something.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Fineeeeeee. Maybe I'll just have a secret side account.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Mayuko, I can't start working with this. I have no idea what you're trying to say.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: You know!!!! Like… it's going to be like, BANG! and BOOM! And then I'll jump to the super yay part in this song, and...

speaker: 4r
dialogue: You're just repeating yourself… Hiroshi, a little help?

speaker: 2h
dialogue: What am I, her translator? I can't read her mind.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Ughhhhhhhh!!! Hiroshi, it's kinda like that one sample you use for everything. That one.

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Oh. Wait, yeah, I know which part she's talking about. Here, Raika, I'll show you.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: I see… but what on earth is the 'super yay part'?

speaker: 1m
dialogue: The part that sounds grey!

speaker: 2h
dialogue: Yeah, no clue.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: *sigh*…

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Hey, don't look so down. We'll probably get what you mean when you show us your mix.

speaker: 1m
dialogue: Yeah… When we make music, Hiroshi usually knows what I'm trying to do. Or I'll just do it myself.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Then we should probably teach you more technical terms than 'super yay'…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Phew! That was too close. I almost tripped over my bag trying to hide in time.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Honestly, I don't know how we got away with that…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Um, because *I* had an excuse locked and loaded. You're welcome, by the way.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: That's not something to be proud of. Don't you feel bad lying to the teacher's face like that??

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Won't *you* feel bad if Sanae gets caught?

speaker: 6c
dialogue: …I mean. It's not like anyone gets hurt…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Exactly. As long as she doesn't find out, it's no one's problem but ours.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Maybe I should try hiding in SEKAI next time. It'll probably be quicker than hiding under the teacher's desk. And there's no way she's finding me there!

speaker: 6c
dialogue: She might get concerned if she sees the flash of light, though… I don't know how we'll explain that.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Ahaha, true… Oh, I know! What if you said that…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (—I can't believe this is what my school life has come to…)

speaker: 6c
dialogue: It's been a while since I've done karaoke…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, same here. Fair warning, guys, I'm really out of practice.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: You're fine, Sanae. At least you've had practice.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: When we choose a song, is there an order we have to sing? Are we assigning lines..?

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Koharu, this isn't a rehearsal. You pick a song and sing whatever parts you want.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Well, forgive me for wanting clarification.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Still, I can't believe you've never done karaoke before… It's fun. You'll like it.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: I call first pick. I heard they added more of MORE MORE JUMP's songs to the machine.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Shouldn't you let Sanae choose first? She has to leave early.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: No, it's fine! Actually, I kinda wanted to see you sing, Kaori.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Really?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Well, yeah! It's not everyday I get to see an idol sing up close!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: …Hehe, in that case, prepared to be amazed~ I'll give you an idol-worthy performance!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Oh, there's Koharu!

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Koharu! Over here!!!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh!! Welcome!! What can I get for…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …You… today…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Well, what does the waiter recommend~?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ughhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Is work really that bad..? I thought you liked working there?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No. No, it's great. I get paid, so I can't complain.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: It's just exhausting. Standing around and smiling all the time, acting all friendly, like I care what type of pancake they want…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: And then there's the people who actually think I want to be their friend!!! As if I'm not *working!!!!!!!!*

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, that sounds about right. Sucks, but that's business.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: If Koharu's tired, maybe we should wrap up early?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No, it's fine. You already had to wait for me to get off work. Let's go already.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: That was fun… Thanks for letting me drag you guys here.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: No problem!! I love Spojoy, I was super excited to hear you wanted to go with us.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: They opened the laser tag arena recently, so I wanted to give it a try…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Um, but to be honest, I just wanted to hold the laser guns. They made the gear look really cool.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No need to be so humble, I know what you mean. They designed it to look futuristic, but not so flashy that it wouldn't be practical…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Is that why you did so bad? You were too focused on the costume design?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ghh— I kept getting cornered! What was I supposed to do?!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Um, not get cornered. Classic laser tag strat.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I mean, she's kinda right. You kept going back to the same area. It was easy to predict where you'd go.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Thanks for the feedback…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Hehe. If you guys want to, let's go again some other time. I want to do another round.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Sounds good to me. I need to get my revenge.
Eek…
*crumble*

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Well, we can't use the stage. On account of the… concrete rubble everywhere.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: You sure? That slab of concrete looks stable enough.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I am *not* climbing through all this debris. These clothes are brand new.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Come on, Koharu, it's just a bit of rubble. Or are you scared to get your hands dirty?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Don't talk to me about getting my hands dirty. When's the last time you've practiced anywhere but a professional studio?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Guys, don't start with this…

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Let's just wait out Miku and MEIKO's battle… SEKAI should go back to normal soon.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yeah, I don't think I want to practice while MEIKO's around, anyway.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: If they take too long, you guys can keep going without me. I have an advisor meeting I need to go to.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: But this routine won't work without the four of us…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh well, that's fine. We'll just have to cut the meeting short.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: Oh…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Fine by me! That just means I can get home and start prepping dinner early.

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Yeah, Chiyomi, don't feel bad. There's always next time.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Hey, we've basically got the hang of this!! Good job, everyone!!!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Nice! Time for a break~ Maybe we should get a treat to celebrate.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: As if you need a break… you had your part down on the first week.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Actually, since we have the time, shouldn't we try practicing in our outfits? If there's any adjustments I need to make, I want to start early.

speaker: 6c
dialogue: I mean, I don't mind. If it makes things faster…

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Blah. What's the rush? It's not like we have a deadline or anything.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: It just feels like we're going slow…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Well, we're not meeting everyday, so that's just expected.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But it's not like we're trying to be actual idols, right? So I think this pace is fine!

speaker: 8k
dialogue: Koharu, are you seriously going to argue against grabbing food together? How heartless can you be?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: I never said that—! Nevermind, let's decide on what to get.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …So what you're saying is, we're all completely doomed…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: STOP SAYING THAT!! You're seriously freaking me out!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Um… At least we're doomed together?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: WAHHH!!! That's NOT HELPING!!!!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Everyone, please, we shouldn't despair like this…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean… you two already had the quiz, but Ami and I still have a chance, right? If we study right now…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: If you'd like, Rion and I can tell you what questions were on the quiz. Would that help?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Hold on, isn't that cheating..?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, stop, why am I getting roped into this?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But Toshi is right!! Desperate times call for desperate measures!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Pleaseeeeeee, Rion? Prettiest please? Please to infinity?

speaker: 12r
dialogue: ...Fine. You have a better chance at passing than I do, anyway.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: But I also have more to lose. So if we get caught, we're all going down together.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Eek…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: What Rion means is, we're not getting caught.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Um, actually, Keishi, how about we go over the textbook chapters together?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Y-yeah, actually, we'll just study on our own...

speaker: 12r
dialogue: *click*

speaker: 12r
dialogue: *click*

speaker: 12r
dialogue: *click*

speaker: 12r
dialogue: *click*

speaker: 11k
dialogue: The light's gonna turn red before we can cross…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: There, is that all?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Hmmm… yep, that's good! Thanks again, Rion~

speaker: 10a
dialogue: But one day, you gotta let me take pictures for you. I got, like, a BUNCH of pose ideas!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Not happening. Especially not in the middle of the crossing.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Pleaseeeee!! I won't post it anywhere!!!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Don't push it.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Eek… Okay…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ami, would you like me to pose for you instead?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Wait, really? Of course~! Here, just stand here and copy what I do!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: …Seriously??? You're so stiff.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. How about this?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: That's barely any better!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: COME ON!!!! Stretch those arms!!! Put some energy into it!!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, move a bit to the left! It'll look cool with the screen centered behind you.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Ooooh, good eye! Now take a step back!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Further!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Andddddddd—!

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Get back here, all of you. The light's turning red.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ahh… oh well. Let's just take the passageway.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: I'm just not sure if we need band outfits…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: We're only playing at the school festival, can't we just wear our uniform..?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Absolutely NOT!!!! We're not going up on stage looking like a bunch of boring nobodies!!! We need to blow the competition out of the water!!!!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: And I'm NOT letting you guys wear THAT.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …Fair enough. But you're gonna have to lead the way. I don't know the rules to all this.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Don't worry~ Toshiki got the hang of it quickly enough.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Yeah, speaking of, where'd the boys go?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: I dunno, I let them loose somewhere. I wanna focus on YOU!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: …Umm. This looks like it should go under the blouse, right..?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I'm not too sure… Maybe you should try it on and see?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, ok! I'll be right back.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: STOP!!!!! Stop stop stop!!!! We keep messing up here!!!!!!!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Sorry, Ami… I think I'm being too slow…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: No no no, YOU'RE fine. It's Toshi and Rion! They keep rushing through the prechorus!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Come on, Toshi, lock in!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: ...My apologies. I'll keep practicing this part.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Toshiki, your playing is fine. She's saying you need to keep with Keishiro's drumming.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: If anything, we probably need more group practice. We're really out of sync.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: You too, Rion! You know that you're supposed to keep with Keishi.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean! If it's easier, maybe I should speed up during this part?

speaker: 10a
dialogue: What? No!!! Why are you trying to mess up on purpose?? You're literally the only one doing it right!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ah… nevermind then…

speaker: 12r
dialogue: …I'm taking a break. Be back in half an hour.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: ?!?! W-Wait! I was just saying, I wasn't angry or anything!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: She's totally mad at us…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I don't think so… she's probably just tired. We have been practicing for a while.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I think a break will do us good. We'll try again with a fresh start.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, Toshiki! What's with the papers?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: It's the application to perform at the school festival… I'm looking over it for any errors.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Wait, you still haven't submitted it? You already had me check it over yesterday.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Yes, but… I just want to make sure. We can't make any changes after it's submitted.

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Geez, haven't you checked it enough? What if you take too long and miss the deadline?

speaker: 11k
dialogue: I mean, he's just being careful! We still have a couple of days, so…

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Gimme that!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ami?!

speaker: 10a
dialogue: Once Keishi and I look it over, you're going to the council and submitting it, PRONTO! We're not gonna miss out on this cuz you're dragging your feet!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …I understand. Sorry for the delay.

speaker: 12r
dialogue: Not like there's any be any issues anyway. It's been triple-checked by now.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Toshiki!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. Hi Sanae. Do you need something?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Can't I check in on my little brother? You're eating your lunch, right?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Yes.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: You're not having trouble with classwork?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Yes.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: You're having fun in brass band?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …Yes.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Okay, just checking! I feel like I never see you outside of school.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I know you want to practice your violin, but you can practice at home too, y'know. Don't worry about the girls, I'll handle them.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: It's fine. You don't need to worry about me…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: In any case, I have band practice with my friends today. So I'll be home late again.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Toshiki, you're in a band?!?! You have friends?!?!?!?!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Oh. Did you not know..?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: No?! That's incredible!!!!!!! Tell me about them!! Do your band have a name yet? Did you take up another instrument?!

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Aah…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Excuse me, Sanae.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Toshiki! Sorry, you're gonna have to walk with me, I'm carrying these chairs back to the classroom.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: There's so many… Do you need help? I can carry some for you.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: No way, you'll hurt your back! I can handle it.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I'm not that weak… It'll be quicker with the two of us.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: *huff* Toshiki, when I say I can handle it, I can handle it. Now, what did you want?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Ah…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: It wasn't anything important… It's just, you're going to be busy with the festival coming up, right?

speaker: 7s
dialogue: Yep! Actually, the work's already started. The deadline's soon, so we're just waiting on any last-minute submissions.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: I see…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: In that case, would you like me to pick up Akari and Yuuka afterschool? It would be easier for you if I watch them.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: …Ha, nice try. I see what you're trying to do.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: But seriously, you focus on your own life. You have that concert coming up, right?

speaker: 9t
dialogue: Yes, but…

speaker: 9t
dialogue: …If you say so.

speaker: 9t
dialogue: (…She doesn't need to know that I quit brass band. I'll just cause more trouble.)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ughhhhhhhhhhhhhhh…

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Why are customers so stupid… all the time…

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Hey, um… Sano, are you okay..?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Oh! Kumazawa. I'm fine. Just taking my break!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: You're usually so cheerful, though. Did someone say something?

speaker: 5k
dialogue: No, nothing like that! I'm just… having an off-day.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Ah!! Sorry!! I'm, probably overstepping!!!

speaker: 11k
dialogue: But if there's anything I can do to help, let me know! We're a team!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: …Thanks, Kumazawa. I appreciate it.

speaker: 5k
dialogue: But really, you can go now.

speaker: 11k
dialogue: Oh, okay!

speaker: 5k
dialogue: (I think he's gone. Where was I…)

speaker: 5k
dialogue: Ughhhhhhhhhhhhhh…

speaker: 7s
dialogue: You guys are lifesavers… Sorry I had to drag you two away from your lunch.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: I thought I could set up the auditorium's mixer myself, but… too many switches…

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Don't be sorry, I get why you were overwhelmed. It was an easy fix, anyway.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Yeah, you can hit up Raika whenever. This stuff is like, her job description.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Don't just offer me up. It's your job description too.

speaker: 3y
dialogue: Not unless you're holding a rave in the auditorium.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: Ugh. Just ignore her, Kakinuma.

speaker: 4r
dialogue: If you need any technical help, feel free to ask. I know you have a lot on your plate.

speaker: 7s
dialogue: It's fine! I think I got it this time, so I won't be bothering you anytime soon.
